Name: Eólica Empregos
Description: Somos o primeiro site no Brasil especializado na divulgação de vagas de empregos para o ramo de energias renováveis.

Name: OW Ocean Winds
Description:
Ocean Winds (OW) is an international company dedicated to offshore wind, leading a new era of clean energy by turning ocean winds into power that lights up homes, businesses, and communities.
A pure offshore wind player, created as a 50-50 joint venture, owned by EDP Renewables and ENGIE, OW develops, finances, builds, and operates offshore wind farms worldwide.
From start to finish, we make it happen—constructing wind farms at sea and keeping them running to deliver reliable, green energy every day. What sets us apart is the expertise of our people, the experience gained through our projects, and the shared vision of our sponsors.
Headquartered in Madrid and present in 8 countries, OW now has close to 19 GW of gross offshore wind capacity either operating, contracted, or with development exclusivity rights secured. 
OW is shaping the future by working closely with governments, partners, communities, and industries to make offshore wind a basis of an attainable tomorrow.
We’re here for the long haul—creating a legacy that not only powers today but also shapes a sustainable future.

Beyond Energy.
Ocean Winds.

Name: Global Wind Service
Description:
Global Wind Service (GWS) is one of the largest companies in Europe offering onshore and offshore installation and servicing of wind turbines around the world. And we do it with the right people, tools and flexibility to deliver the best possible solutions to the highest quality.

Our goal is always to meet and exceed our clients’ expectations. As a result, GWS has gained an excellent reputation and fast established itself as the preferred international supplier of qualified and skilled personnel to the global wind turbine industry.

Our track record to date includes wind turbine installations and service work in over 40 countries – from the United States, Finland, Germany and the UK to Morocco, South Africa, Australia, the Philippines and more.

We have established business units in eleven countries, giving us the opportunity to be closer to our customers and react faster to local market requirements.

Today Fred. Olsen Ocean holds majority ownership of Global Wind Service. 
Fred. Olsen is a Norwegian company, that carries a tradition dating back to 1848, when the company first entered the shipping and marine industry. That tradition of supplying the highest quality products and services endures to this day.

Name: Muehlhan Wind Service
Description:
Muehlhan Wind Service is a leading full-scope independent service provider delivering wind turbine installation and Operations & Maintenance solutions to wind energy clients in more than 35 countries around the world.

Passionate about wind and driven by the desire to make a difference for our customers, we take pride in delivering projects of all sizes across our seven business units: Offshore Installations, Onshore Installations, HV & Electrical Service, Blade Inspections & Repairs, Service & Statutory Inspections, Paint & Corrosion Control and Manpower Solutions.

Our scale, scope and knowledge allow us to act as trusted advisor to the leading players in the wind energy industry especially within the core areas of pre-assembly & installation, advanced blade repairs, complicated rope access tasks, main component replacements and paint & corrosion control. 

We build our success on motivated, skilled and open-minded people who share our passion for wind and enjoy working in a dynamic, international environment. 

For more information, please visit our website: www.muehlhan.com

Name: Renova Energia SA
Description:
Empresa de energia alternativa Brasileira, foco em PCH( pequenas centrais hidreletricas) e parques eolicos.
Primeira compania aberta nesse setor listada na  Bovespa.
Ciclo de implementação integrado.
Controle brasileiro.
Escritorios em SP, MG, BA, TO.

Name: Copenhagen Offshore Partners
Description:
We are unlocking the full potential of offshore wind to power the world. At Copenhagen Offshore Partners, we lead offshore wind project origination and development through construction and operations to build value that matters.   

Every day, we strive to safely deliver offshore wind projects in new and established markets with sustainability at their core. We are not afraid to be a first mover or fast follower, which means we strive to implement new solutions and open new opportunities, while always ensuring strong support from the public, communities and governments.

Name: Boston Energy
Description: We are a wind turbine service provider and our core purpose is to provide expert support to ensure that the wind industry continues to run without disruption, whether that be through maintenance of turbines, support with construction and installation, manpower provision, or ensuring all technicians are fully qualified and trained to the best quality.

Name: Eurowind Energy
Description:
Eurowind Energy develops, constructs, and operates renewable energy parks. We are dedicated to local long-term solutions, and we believe that the future of energy supply is renewable, clean, and sustainable. 
Eurowind Energy's HQ is located in Hobro, Denmark. 
With more than 600 employees across 16 European countries and the US, the goal is to create a future fueled on nothing but renewable energy by making investments in renewable energy projects. Projects are developed in close collaboration with local competences. Eurowind Energy only engages in projects that they, themselves, want to invest in. That is the client's security for a strong and reliable investment.

Eurowind Energy A/S is owned 50 % by EWE Holding ApS and 50 % by Norlys Holding A/S.

Name: Principle Power
Description:
Principle Power is a global leader in floating wind technology, providing full lifecycle engineering services that deliver reliable, de-risked, and bankable solutions. Principle Power works with developers, independent power producers, utilities, and EPCs to deliver integrated designs that minimize project risk and maximize energy output. The WindFloat portfolio consists of four modular platform technologies optimized for turbines above 15MW and suitable for any supply chain setup. With 75 MW capacity in operation (the 25 MW WindFloat Atlantic in Portugal, and the 50 MW Kincardine Offshore Wind Farm in Scotland) and 30 MW under construction (EFGL in France), the technology has proven resilient in the challenging Atlantic and North Sea weather conditions, delivering more than 1 TWh of clean energy since
WindFloat 1 was installed in 2011.
Principle Power is working with customers and partners to commercialize floating wind in different regions with a robust project industrialization plan that emphasizes compatibility with existing manufacturing capacity, while also advancing a vision for purpose-built, automated WindFloat factories to drive costs and schedule to a minimum. Principle Power offers unique, full-lifecycle services combining dedicated expert teams, validated design tools, and proven processes that have been refined based on real-world operational experience providing confidence from the earliest design phases. Principle Power has secured exclusivity to supply WindFloat technology to commercial-scale projects in all key floating wind markets totaling 14+ GW of projects secured or under design contract.

Name: TEN - Torres Eólicas do Nordeste
Description:
A Torres Eólicas do Nordeste é um fabricante brasileiro de torres eólicas em aço. 

A planta industrial da TEN conta com equipamentos de última geração, desenvolvidos especificamente para a manufatura de torres eólicas metálicas, o que permite a produção seriada, com alta produtividade e dentro dos mais criteriosos controles de qualidade. As instalações fabris foram concebidas visando uma linha de produção versátil, capaz de atender os mais variados processos, geometrias e especificações em cada projeto. 

Localizada na cidade de Jacobina, na Bahia, a TEN está estrategicamente situada próximo às melhores regiões para implantação de projetos de energia eólica no país, oferecendo a seus clientes significativa redução de custos com transporte.

Name: RTS Wind UK
Description:
RTS Wind Limited specialise in the provision of services to the onshore and offshore renewable energy sector. With our UK head office based in the North East of England, our team have extensive experience of working on many of the most significant wind farms across the UK, Europe, Asia, and also in the emerging US offshore market.

RTS are a recognised leader in the provision of manpower and maintenance services - including Specialist Blade Inspection and Repair, Construction Support, Service Operations and Maintenance, and Inspection Services.

With over two decades in track record behind us, our knowledge and experience enables us to work with our customers to develop solutions that address the challenges of any project and precisely meet their needs.

Name: Swire Renewable Energy
Description: Leading global renewable energy inspection, repair and maintenance service provider for wind turbine manufacturers and wind farm owners, providing services and expertise to all clients in the renewable energy supply chain

Name: Vento Energy Support
Description:
GLOBAL SUPPLIER OF PROFESSIONALS FOR THE WIND POWER INDUSTRY
 
Wind turbines are an investment in the future. 

We want to make a difference and contribute to optimizing the output of wind turbines.

We are not limited by location or culture. In fact, we have documented experience from 4 different continents. We offer our services for both onshore and offshore projects.

Name: Makani
Description:
Makani aimed to enable more people around the world to have access to clean, affordable wind power by developing energy kites, an airborne wind energy technology that used a wing tethered to a ground station, to efficiently harness energy from the wind.

By replacing the massive steel towers of conventional wind turbines with lightweight hardware and smart software, Makani hoped to unlock access to wind resources too expensive or impractical to access with traditional wind technologies.

In 2020, Makani’s journey as a company came to an end. Learn more about the team’s 13 year journey building an entirely new type of wind energy technology by visiting: www.x.company/projects/makani

Name: Corio Generation
Description:
Corio Generation is a portfolio company of Macquarie Asset Management operating on a standalone basis. 

Our global team of offshore wind specialists take projects from origination, through development and construction, and into operations.

We apply a long-term partnership approach to the creation and management of projects, underpinned by access to long-term capital.

Working in established and emerging markets, with floating and traditional fixed-bottom technologies, our projects support local economies while meeting the energy needs of communities and corporate offtakers sustainably, reliably, safely and responsibly.

Name: Skyborn Renewables
Description: Skyborn Renewables is driving global decarbonisation by accelerating offshore wind energy across the world. We believe offshore wind is a cornerstone of the clean energy transition and an enabler to achieve net-zero targets, ensure energy security, and a sustainable energy supply for future generations.

Name: Baltic Power
Description: Baltic Power offshore wind farm is a project jointly developed by ORLEN Group and Northland Power. Baltic Power is the most advanced and most dynamically advancing offshore wind farm project in the Polish part of the Baltic Sea. In the area located about 22 km from the shore at the height of Łeba and Choczewo there will stand 76 wind turbines, with a capacity of 15 MW, which will produce up to 1.2 GW of clean energy, powering more than 1.5 million households annually. Construction of the farm is scheduled for 2024-2026.

Name: ENDIPREV
Description:
Advanced diagnosis of faults of the whole type of electrical systems
Commissioning of wind turbines

Troubleshooting during the different lifetime periods of wind turbines

Maintenance of wind turbines in the different periods of maintenance

Wind farms Operation, ensuring maximization of the availability of wind turbines

Name: MDWind
Description:
MDWind – your partner all along your wind farm’s life cycle. 
Our mission: your turbines’ long safe and stable energy production. 

We provide adaptive turnkey solutions. Our service portfolio covers project management, the installation of new and used turbines, customized Maintenance solutions, Rotor Blade Services, Main Component Exchange (MCR) and Repowering. We make it a full circle. 

With a firm quality and safety-first focus, MDWind technicians are trained and certified on the latest technology and safety standards. Next to our teams on site, our dedicated back office provides project management, guidance and assistance throughout all project stages.

Since MDWind was founded in 2010, the company has consistently expanded its expertise to become a multi-technology service provider. Repowering is the latest activity the company is strongly developing. Among our clients there are developers, operators, manufacturers, electricity suppliers and landowners. 

Over the years, MDWind has known a solid growth. The company deploys its teams internationally and has operated in more than 18 countries to date. 

We are strongly committed to driving the change towards a sustainable energy future. Customer care, continuous improvement, excellence and innovation are at the centre of all our activities.

Name: Energy Wind & Renewables LTD. (EWR)
Description:
Energy Wind & Renewables Ltd (EWR) is a full-service wind energy solutions provider supporting wind farms across North America. We deliver safe, high-quality services throughout the full project lifecycle — from turnkey installation and maintenance to crane operations, project planning, and technical support.

With a skilled team and a strong safety culture, EWR helps renewable energy partners build and maintain efficient wind energy assets. 

As part of the Muehlhan Wind Service Group, we combine local expertise with global standards to support the growing demands of the North American wind market. Visit https://www.muehlhan.com/wind-services/ to learn more.

Name: ArthWind Technologies
Description: ArthWind Technologies specializes in providing cutting-edge solutions for wind blade O&M, prioritizing essential values such as safety, accuracy, and efficiency in the inspection process. Collaborating with highly specialized wind blade engineers, we offer comprehensive wind blade O&M consulting, utilizing advanced visual inspection techniques with Drones, conducting Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for blade failures, and delivering a wide range of added value technologies. Our commitment to excellence ensures that our customers benefit from the most advanced and reliable services in the industry.

Name: ArthWind Technologies
Description: ArthWind Technologies specializes in providing cutting-edge solutions for wind blade O&M, prioritizing essential values such as safety, accuracy, and efficiency in the inspection process. Collaborating with highly specialized wind blade engineers, we offer comprehensive wind blade O&M consulting, utilizing advanced visual inspection techniques with Drones, conducting Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for blade failures, and delivering a wide range of added value technologies. Our commitment to excellence ensures that our customers benefit from the most advanced and reliable services in the industry.

Name: Engeform Energia | PEC Energia
Description: Desde 2008, desenvolvemos projetos de energia renovável, construímos e operamos parques eólicos e geramos e comercializamos energia limpa e renovável para todo o Brasil. Com mais de R$ 2 bilhões em investimentos já realizados e 227 MW em ativos operacionais próprios, temos como missão impulsionar a transição para um futuro sustentável por meio da geração e comercialização de energia renovável.

Name: Hellenic Wind Energy Association
Description:
Hellenic Wind Energy Association HWEA/ELETAEN is the association of the wind energy scientists and the wind energy companies in Greece. The company-members of HWEA/ELETAEN include investors, operators, developers, manufactures and providers of services and products throughout the whole supply chain.

HWEA/ELETAEN serves a two-fold mission. Firstly, it targets to facilitate the scientific research and academic work in all aspects related to wind energy in Greece. Moreover, it promotes the development of the wind energy market in Greece through proposals for policy measures and consulting actions towards the decision makers and the public authorities.

Name: Star of the South
Description:
The Star of the South is Australia's most advanced offshore wind project, proposed off the coast of Gippsland in Victoria. If developed to its full potential Star of the South would provide up to around 20% of Victoria’s energy requirements while creating jobs and investing in the local economy.

The project is currently in the feasibility stage.

The Star of the South is being progressed by local Australian developers, along with expert offshore wind partners, Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners and Copenhagen Offshore Partners. 

Our goal is to secure Australia's long-term energy needs in an environmentally-friendly and sustainable way.

Name: Fred. Olsen Renewables
Description:
Fred. Olsen Renewables is a developer, owner, and operator in renewable energy with history back to the mid-1990s.

Based on a solid position in UK and Scandinavia with 12 operating wind farms, we are expanding into new countries and new technologies. 

An increased focus on renewable energy development over the last few years has led to a total project pipeline of ~4 GW in onshore and offshore wind. In addition, we are developing several prospects within both wind energy and solar energy.

At Fred. Olsen Renewables we take our environmental responsibilities just as seriously as we do generating electricity.

It is embedded in Fred. Olsen Renewables' culture to maintain a sustainable business model and to minimise the environmental footprint in all our activities.

Fred. Olsen Renewables is wholly owned by the listed (Oslo Stock Exchange) company Bonheur ASA.

Name: BW Ideol
Description: BW Ideol is a pioneer and global leader in floating offshore wind since 2010. With more than 15 years of experience in the design, execution, and development of floating wind projects based on its patented Damping Pool technology, the company is positioned as a floating foundation supplier and a co-developer.

Name: ABS Renew Power Pvt Ltd
Description:
Wind Farms and Solar PV Systems are one of the most environmentally friendly and flexible power generation sources imaginable. The demand for energy is rising with the rapidly increasing Indian population. Realizing the tremendous potential of wind and solar energy in solving the big issue of Electricity around the world, ABS Renew Power is harnessing these non-conventional resources to promote green energy.

As a strategic partner to the energy industry; we offer
•	Wind Maintenance - As a TSP (Third Party Service Provider) our services are designed to be proactive and establish new standards in execution (construction & maintenance phase) of the entire operations & technical maintenance of both On-shore & Off-shore Wind Projects.

•	Economically viable and technically superior Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) services help ABS Renew Power promote the win-win situation of bill savings and eliminating carbon footprint. Leveraging its linkages with the best global technology providers, we bring a diverse portfolio of services for solar energy systems, which are suitable for Residential, Industrial & Commercial applications.
Envisaging its crucial role in the power requirements of the nation, we are bringing sustainable energy to the forefront to help India address the twin challenges of energy security and combating global warming.
WHY ABS Renew Power:
•	Turnkey Solutions.
•	Service Infrastructure that spans across PAN India with 24x7x365 support with certified workforce.
•	ISO 9001: 2015 Complied for Quality standards, ISO 45001: 2018 Complied for Safety procedures.
•	Intelligent System Monitoring for Solar and Wind - Surveillance & Technical Condition Audit (TCA), Incidence Investigation and End of Warranty (EOW), Pitch and Yaw Alignment Services & more.
•	Committed long term partner with the option of AMC Post Warranty.
•	Step by Step systematic Installation Process from Site Survey to Completion.

Name: Global Wind Projects
Description:
Global Wind Projects, a new division of Global Port Services, aspires to become one of the UK and Ireland’s leading providers of wind turbine installation services, both onshore and  offshore. 
Supplying skilled wind turbine technicians to OEM’s and developers to assist with the installation of their wind projects. Working in conjunction with the parent company; Global Port Services, Global Wind Projects will have access to a full suite of mobile and crawler cranes through Global Crane Services, to provide customers with a seamless crane and installation package (C&I) supported by experienced and skilled teams.

Name: WORLD FORUM OFFSHORE WIND (WFO)
Description: WFO is the world’s leading business platform for the offshore wind industry. By connecting and supporting our members, WFO is helping to make offshore wind one of the world’s leading sources of renewable energy.

Name: Eni Plenitude Wind & Energy
Description:
Società di Eni Plenitude S.p.A. Società Benefit.
Società soggetta all'attivita di direzione e coordinamento di Eni. S.p.A.
Società con unico socio

Name: X1 Wind
Description:
X1 Wind is a disruptive floating wind technology developer. It has developed and proven its floating  wind platform with the potential to make a step-change in offshore wind. 

The concept is the result of more than 10 years of experience and learning in offshore renewables of the founding team. It has been designed to benefit from the “offshore” environment to drive costs down. The design drivers have been a significant weight reduction compared to current systems, simplified installation with a quick connection system, elimination of unnecessary systems to reduce maintenance and scalability.

The company's innovation potential has resulted in the 2nd prize at the Cleantech Camp Contest, and in the recognition of highly renowned organizations such as the Innoenergy's Highway Program and the H2020 SME Instrument.

Name: Wind Power LAB
Description:
Wind Power LAB is a Danish company, founded in 2016 by a passionate group of wind power industry professionals. Our team of experts based in Copenhagen offers market leading expertise related to blade risk management. Our goal is to deliver the best available and robust solutions to empower our clients with the ability to make decisions to optimize their asset performance.

Core Services
- Image to Advice: expert blade help whenever you need it
- Artificial intelligence and deep learning algorithm tools for damage/defect detection and assessment
- Repair Recommendations built on technical knowledge and experience
- Root Cause Analysis - What, When, How, Why and solutions for the future
- Engineering advise, QA/QC services and technical due diligence
- Blade Maintenance Strategies, reduce OPEX from actionable data insights
- AEP loss calculations and investigations
- Market guidance for products and innovation

Name: Lekela Power (an Infinity Power company)
Description:
Lekela is a renewable power generation company. We deliver utility-scale projects that supply much-needed clean energy to communities across Africa. 

Founded in 2015, our platform develops, owns and operates wind and solar assets. Today, our portfolio includes over 1 gigawatt of wind power in operation across Egypt, South Africa and Senegal. We also have a pipeline of additional projects in development across Africa. 

Taking projects from mid or late-stage development into long-term operation, we focus on delivering sustainable, reliable and competitively-priced power to governments, utilities and large-scale industrial projects. 

We also take an active role driving the long-term prosperity of the local communities we operate in. At every site where we operate, we aim to make a positive impact that lasts for generations. Supplying clean energy is one part of this, but we also develop programmes focused on education, enterprise and the environment in our communities.

Name: Energimp S.A.
Description:
A Energimp, geradora de energia eólica, tem como Missão:

Gerar resultados sustentáveis para seus acionistas e desenvolvimento para a sua gente.
Gerar energia com responsabilidade ambiental.
Gerar bem-estar social para as comunidades onde atua e desenvolver parcerias com seus fornecedores.

A empresa atua em dois estados: Santa Catarina e Ceará.

Name: Copenhagen Energy
Description:
At Copenhagen Energy A/S we take renewable energy projects from green field to final investment decision. Our skilled team can deliver such projects as turn-key or in combination with partners’ resources. We lead the process and provide the key critical resources. 

We combine the local expertise and our global experience to create the best possible projects. In addition, we bring in external financing when needed to accelerate the project realization. This is why, working with the right partners is of great essence to us. 

Copenhagen Energy A/S is headquartered in the new development district of Carlsberg City in central Copenhagen. A visionary and sustainable urban development in line with the visions of Jacobsen (founder of Carlsberg). Our location perfectly reassembles the core of our company and our ambitions.

Name: Saitec Offshore Technologies
Description:
Saitec Offshore Technologies specializes in delivering comprehensive Engineering and Project Management solutions for the offshore wind industry. As part of the Saitec Engineering group, with over three decades of industry expertise, we offer a diverse range of services to support your offshore wind activities:

• SATH designers: Since 2016, we specialize in SATH Technology, an innovative solution developed to harness offshore wind potential at depths beyond 30m. Our focus on cost-efficiency ensures a transformation of this inexhaustible energy source into clean, sustainable power. The DemoSATH project marks the beginning of floating wind into the Spanish energy mix, operational since Q3. It serves as a testament to technological capabilities, establishing a novel clean energy source and contributing significantly to the maturation of the technology market.

• Industrial production: Our company is ready to produce SATH floating wind platforms, facilitating the realization of energy transition objectives through large-scale production and establishment in strategic port locations across the globe.

• Consultancy services: 
We leverage extensive expertise to offer personalized evaluations for the floating offshore wind sector and its stakeholders. Our methodology guarantees accurate assessments, empowering to make well-informed decisions.

Curious to learn more? Reach out to us today and discover how our innovative solutions can drive your success in the offshore wind industry. www.saitec-offshore.com

Name: Windletter
Description:
Weekly publication on the wind energy sector edited by Sergio Fernández Munguía.

Windletter aims to explain what is happening in the world of wind energy from a different perspective and in a technically precise yet accessible manner for all audiences.

The newsletter consists of a weekly compilation of the most relevant news in the sector, including numerous links as well as analysis, opinion, and context.

Name: Deep Wind Offshore
Description: Deep Wind Offshore skal utvikle og generere fornybar energi, og vi har eiere som ønsker vekst i sektoren. Selskapet ser på aktuelle områder, både i Norge og internasjonalt. Med en av Norges største kraftprodusenter på eiersiden, og Knutsen som har betydelig maritim- og offshore kompetanse er vi forberedt på å både utvikle og ha eierposisjoner i ulike havvindprosjekter.

Name: Danwind
Description:
We transform what you deem impossible to possible. Our mission is to accelerate the supply chains transition to sustainable energy. By constantly challenging the wind industry’s existing solutions and mindset. At all times we strive to think ahead and be first mover in terms of the demands and developments required by the wind industry. Using a first-principles approach, we solve some of the wind industry’s biggest problems.

We are advanced supply chain navigators providing solutions to our partners and customers in every continent. We are agile, flexible, responsible, sustainable and a visionary team that provides 360° service with our innovative solutions.

We’re not only investing in spare parts, but in colleagues and teams, recruitments and hirings - As our employees create our value. 
The Danwind Team are truly designed for our customers' operation.
We provide customer service that are not just great, but the best, period.

Name: EnergieTEAM
Description: Acteur indépendant des énergies renouvelables depuis plus de 20 ans, nous développons des parcs éoliens, des centrales photovoltaïques ainsi que des solutions de stockage d’énergie. Notre expertise s’étend du développement à la construction, jusqu’à l’exploitation. Afin de garantir le succès de nos projets, nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec les acteurs du territoire dès les phases préalables.

Name: Aeolon Technology Co.,Ltd
Description:
Founded in 2007 as the leading wind turbine blade manufacturer, Aeolon Technology Corporation is headquartered in Shanghai China, including 5 domestic plants in East China, North China, Northeast and Northwest China and currently expanding the global footprints to strategic locations close to European markets.
Our expertise and integration of design, manufacturing, sales and service in high quality products, allows us to become the long-standing partnership with Top 10 Wind Turbine manufacturers globally. At the same time, we also leverage our advanced facilities, effective processes and innovative technologies through well-trained professionals to provide the cost-effective solutions to all customers around the world.
By creating a safe and clean working environment, Aeolon continues to support the decarbonization of energy production to build the world with blue sky for better future.

Name: VORTEX
Description:
Vortex is a wind resource modeling service for the wind energy industry. It provides fast, online access to high-quality modeled wind data for any location worldwide, supporting wind project development from early assessment to detailed site analysis.

Vortex wind resource synthetic data can be used at each step of a wind farm development, from prospecting phase to operation.

Name: GPLwind Ltd
Description: Providing training and recruitment to the renewable energy sector

Name: Asociación Empresarial Eólica (AEE)
Description:
La Asociación Empresarial Eólica (AEE) es la voz del sector eólico en España. Promueve el uso de la energía eólica en nuestro país, en Europa y en el mundo entero. Representa y defiende los intereses del sector.

AEE cuenta con más de 300 empresas asociadas y representa a más del 90% del sector en España, que incluye a los promotores, los fabricantes de aerogeneradores y componentes, asociaciones nacionales y regionales, organizaciones ligadas al sector, consultores, abogados y entidades financieras y aseguradoras, entre otros.

AEE coordina la investigación en las áreas que rodean la energía eólica y da servicio a sus asociados respondiendo a sus diferentes necesidades. Contribuye a la formulación del marco normativo con el objetivo de que el sector se desarrolle en las mejores condiciones posibles. Divulga la realidad de la energía eólica y realiza una labor didáctica de cara a la sociedad. Pone en marcha eventos de alto nivel en los que reúne a destacadas personalidades a nivel nacional e internacional. Publica informes y estudios que son una referencia.

Además, AEE ejerce la secretaría de REOLTEC (Plataforma Tecnológica del Sector Eólico), coordina con el ICEX la presencia de las empresas españolas en ferias y congresos en el exterior y es miembro de asociaciones internacionales como WindEurope (antigua EWEA).

Name: Business in Wind
Description: The solution for challenging wind projects: we purchase used wind turbines, upgrade them to current standards and give them a second life at your location.

Name: SouthCoast Wind
Description:
SouthCoast Wind is developing a federal offshore wind lease area off New England — located over 30 miles south of Martha’s Vineyard and 20 miles south of Nantucket— that has the potential to generate 2,400 megawatts (MW) of low-cost clean energy, or enough to power over a million homes. 

SouthCoast Wind is backed by OW Ocean Winds, an established developer of offshore wind projects worldwide with deep experience in managing the complexities of offshore energy development projects. We are committed to safety first and safety always, innovation and industry development, and investing in our local communities.

Name: FuturEnergy Ireland
Description:
FuturEnergy Ireland is a joint venture company owned by Coillte and ESB that launched in November 2021. Combining the nation’s strongest assets and expertise in renewable energy development, FuturEnergy Ireland’s mission is to maximise the potential of our unique wind and land resources and accelerate Ireland’s transformation to a low carbon energy economy.
Our ambition is to develop more than 1GW of renewable energy capacity by 2030 and to make a significant contribution to Ireland’s commitment to produce 80% of electricity from renewable sources by the end of the decade. We want to do this by driving the development of the highest quality, locally supported green energy projects in Ireland.

Name: ProCon
Description:
Home of ProCon Wind Energy & Hyndla - Electrifying Offshore Wind

ProCon & Hyndla provides electrical, technical, and interface minimization solutions and turnkey offerings for BOP to the global wind industry. 

- Design Engineering (Mechanical and Electrical)
- Structual Calculations & Analysis
- Production, Procurement & Supply
- Onshore Pre-assembly, Outfitting, Installation, Test & Termination
- Offhore M&E Completion
- Offshore Commissioning
- Offshore O&M
- Offshore Retrofit, Upgrade & Repair
- Project Management, Supervision, Quality Control & Manpower

As a part of the Integrated Wind Solutions family, together with IWS Fleet and Green Ducklings, we also offer stand alone and bundled solutions with state-of-the-art CSOVs with our package of adhering services to reduce bottle-necks and cost of energy. 

Websites:
- www.procon.as
- www.hyndla.com
- www.integratedwind.com
- www.greenducklings.com

Name: Wind Pioneers
Description:
Wind Pioneers are specialist wind engineers who bring highly innovative, flexible & cost-effective technical services to wind farm developers and investors. 

Vision - To be the best in the world at finding and designing new wind farm sites.

Mission - Wind Pioneers will develop more efficient wind farms on windier sites for greater environmental benefit.

Values - We combine innovative approaches and engineering automation with a vibrant, dynamic & friendly team.

Name: Holi-DOCTOR project
Description:

The key objectives of the projects are related to improving the sustainability and circularity of wind turbine development by:

1) Focusing on the socio-economic impact including worker safety and developing new business models for wind turbine maintenance.

2) Exploring the ability to monitor and measure noise impacts and provide real-time feedback to relevant stakeholders through digital infrastructure.

3) Exploring the ability to use the Holi-Doctor Tool in combination with bird strike and other wildlife detection systems.

Name: Trivane Floating Wind
Description:
Trivane is a floating offshore wind platform in the form of a semi-submersible trimaran.  It weather vanes about a turret mooring at the bow.

In September 2021 BEIS provided generous funding to support the development of Trivane.
Any standard tower and 15 MW  turbine is supported on the stern of the centre hull.
The turret is at the bow of the forward floater, which is the forward part of the centre hull. This is a column turret having plain bearings. 

Trivane has had considerable experience of these turrets via work at London Marine Consultants (LMC) over 30 years

Analysis of Trivane’s design has been by LMC and others
1:50 scale model tests were carried out at FloWave in Edinburgh during 2023 and 2024

Major findings of the work on these designs include:
- the platform will cost much less if built in concrete instead of steel.
- the streamlined hull results in low mooring line forces and hence low mooring system costs.
- trim is small because this weather-vaning design can be pre-ballasted by the bow in the at-rest condition. Roll and list are very small. Active ballasting is not required.
- Steel versions, and the stell pars of the concrete versions, are all built in stiffened flat plate and not as cylinders. This means that many yards and fabrication facilities can build these structures 
Investors and partners are now invited to join Trivane in building and deploying a Demonstrator and Commercial versions.

Core Services

It also specialises in expert-in-the-loop digital QA prototyping that systematises and automates repeatable processes.

OWnD's Principles
Its approach is built on a foundation of rigorous adherence to standards, complete auditability, and the judicious use of automation. OWnD believes in total transparency, making the limitations and dependencies of any analysis explicit to deliver results its clients can trust.

OWnD partners with developers, lenders, investors, asset operators, and consultancies who require robust and defensible wind energy solutions.

Co přináším
• Odborný obsah a osvěta: články, Q&A materiály, workshopy, mediální výstupy zvyšující akceptaci projektů.

• Strategie komunikace: rámec pro dialog s obcemi a partnery, jasné benefity (energie, lokální ekonomika, krajina).

Na čem stavím
Zkušenosti z praxe na pomezí marketingu, obchodu a energetiky: od prvních studií a analytických podkladů přes investor decky až po komunikaci směrem k veřejnosti. Dlouhodobě sleduji legislativu ČR/EU, moderní turbíny, storage a smart-grids a převádím je do konkrétních kroků.

Tento profil je můj znalostní hub: sdílím case studies, checklisty a nástroje pro kvalifikované rozhodování.
Potřebujete srozumitelně představit záměr, ověřit potenciál lokality nebo připravit první prezentaci pro investora? Ozvěte se. Společně postavíme silný, daty podložený příběh – bez prodeje technologií a bez vazby na konkrétní firmu.

Flere af vores aktiviteter sker i nært samarbejde med vores netværk af professionelle samarbejdspartnere, hvorved vi opnår store spidskompetencer og fleksibilitet på en lang række områder.

Med udgangspunkt i den elektricitet, som fremstilles via firmaets egen portefølje af vindmøller, handles også med miljøvenlig el, som sælges på engros-markedet for elektricitet. Virksomheder og slutforbrugere kan bl.a. købe den miljøvenlige strøm gennem elselskabet Vindstød. I øvrigt til nogle af markedets laveste priser og med garanti/certifikat på, at strømmen kommer fra vindmøller (se mere på http://www.vindstoed.dk).

Virksomheden er etableret i 1985 og har siden starten projekteret og opført langt over hundrede vindmøller med kapaciteter på mellem 55 kW og 3,6 MW. Vi har således oparbejdet en meget stor ekspertise indenfor alle faser der vedrører vindmølleprojekter.

Vi er meget interesserede i en dialog med dig, hvis du går med tanker om et vindmølleprojekt eller hvis du er interesseret i en vindmøllehandel - kontakt os ganske uforpligtende for en nærmere dialog!

Følg gerne vores side, hvor der med tiden vil komme mere information og nyheder om virksomheden.

Name: WEG Systems
Description:
WEG's Hydrogen/Helium Lofted Wind Energy Generation Systems answer the question, "What's next in wind energy?"

Our Wind to Energy Generator (WEG) is a lofted, tethered, lighter-than-air aircraft (aerostat) that gains its lift using a buoyant gas. The WEG generates electrical power by floating two counter rotating vertical wind turbines driving four exclusive integrated high efficiency generators. WEG has distinct advantages over conventional wind turbines including:

• global deployment
• lower costs of construction, implementation & deployment
• lower costs for upkeep, maintainance & refurbishment 
• low wind speed operation
• superior environmental advantages
• the ability to reach stronger winds at higher altitudes
• the ability to produce electricity a significantly  greater percentage of the time

A WEG system is a completely self-contained electrical power plant. The WEG aerostat is inflated with HYDROGEN (outside of the US and Canada) or helium (in US & Canada).  (Combined with our Waste-to-Energy "Clear" HYDROGEN producing technology, a wind field of units can be kept aloft, while eliminating waste - tires, plastic, etc. - and selling excess HYDROGEN.) WEG systems range in size from 100 kW to 1 MW.

By reaching stronger winds at higher altitudes and operating at a far wider range of wind speeds, many placement limitations of traditional wind turbines are overcome. Thus, the WEG can be placed directly where the power is needed. At WEG, we believe this is a MONUMENTAL breakthrough which will allow much more of the world's population to tap into the abundance of wind energy available to them.

Name: Hydrogenium
Description: Introducing the next generation Wind 5.0 integrated 10-20 Megawatt wind power generating array capable of producing 70 tons (70,000 kg) of hydrogen per day, with 200 tons (6.66 gigawatt hours storage) incorporated into the turbine foundation. Moving into the post hydrocarbon economy requires a dramatically different approach, and with this integrated solution humanity has a hope of actually making the transition in the near future. We almost hunted the whales to extinction for lamp oil before the invention of the bamboo filament lightbulb and now evolution to quantum dot LED's. Wind power generation has existed for over 1000 years as can still be witnessed in the original wind powered "mills" still milling grains for bread to this day. Modern wind turbine technology has had very few improvements over the last 120 years only growing larger without fundamental principles changing. Now the limits of physics have been reached with Siemens Gamesa's quality issues causing a massive blow to the wind power industry. Hydrogenium combines up to 12 turbine arrays each producing up to 1.2MW and allows for more adaptability in construction while taking an integrated approach that allows for mass production to the tune of 1 new 10-20 MW turbine erected and assembled daily. When combined with integrated production of hydrogen and carbon capture the C from the Co2 and the N from the Nox emissions of nearby mixed fuel gas turbines in the range of 20 - 40 MW allow for exportable liquid fuels, hydrogen carriers, and sustainable fertilizers like Green Ammonia, Methanol, Urea, Formic Acid (formate), and Dimethyl Ether. This is what sustainability looks like. The notoriously difficult to de-carbonize industries like shipping and aviation will be able to transition with the production and conversion of large scale high density micro-algae cultivation, unlocking the future of SAF (Sustainable Aviation Fuel) + SMF (Sustainable Maritime Fuel). Lets change the history of humanity together!

Name: AGE Wind Tools
Description:
At AGE Wind Tools, we design and manufacture advanced composite tools engineered for the next generation of wind energy. Our products — including the Cypress God Key, Seam-Seal Tool, and Transformer Alignment Pins — are built from high-strength PET-CF materials to deliver reliability, repeatability, and measurable efficiency gains in the field.

Our mission is simple: help wind technicians work faster, safer, and smarter. Each tool is field-tested on active turbine projects and refined through direct collaboration with installation leads and engineering teams. The result is a line of precision-fit tools that eliminate guesswork, reduce flange-repair costs, and increase uptime across GE Vernova Cypress and comparable turbine platforms.

AGE Wind Tools operates under JS Capital Ventures LLC, combining design innovation, additive manufacturing, and field-proven practicality. From rapid-prototyping to production scaling, we bring the flexibility of small-batch engineering with the quality control standards of enterprise manufacturing.

Empowering the technicians who build tomorrow’s energy infrastructure — one tool at a time.

Name: Wind tut gutes
Description:
Seit dem Jahr 2000 drehen sich zwischen Huje und Nutteln Windräder. Diese sorgen seitdem für umweltfreundlichen Strom, aber auch für zusätzliche Einnahmen für die Landeigentümer und den Gemeinden Huje sowie Nutteln. Leider war der Energieertrag der bisherigen Windmühlen eher unbefriedigend, so dass es nur zu einer überschaubaren Ausschüttung von Geld kommen konnte. Seit im Jahr 2014 der Plan gefasst wurde, die alten Windmühlen durch neue, leistungsfähigere zu ersetzen, ist es ein Anliegen der Landeigentümer auch der Allgemeinheit in unseren Gemeinden mehr vom Windertrag zukommen zu lassen. Wir möchten an dieser Stelle betonen, dass dieses Geld freiwillig von insgesamt 36 Landeigentümern im Windgebiet Huje / Nutteln gezahlt wird.

Um diese Zahlungen auch in Zukunft rechtlich sauber und korrekt zu leisten, haben wir einen gemeinnützigen Verein gegründet.

Dieser gemeinnützige Verein trägt den Namen: Wind tut Gutes e.V.

Jährlich wird neu entschieden, welche Organisationen, Vereine, Gruppen oder Projekte gefördert werden. Im ersten Jahr haben wir mehrere kleinere Projekte gefördert, auch um unseren Verein in den Dörfern bekannt zu machen. Was im Jahr 2022 bezahlt und unterstützt wird, können Sie auf der Seite Projekte sehen. Anregungen der Bürger, welche gemeinnützigen Projekte demnächst gefördert werden könnten, nehmen wir gerne entgegen.

Name: TWE-Tandem Wind Energy GmbH
Description:
Die TWE - Tandem Wind Energy GmbH entwickelt und vermarktet innovative, kleine und robuste Windkraftanlagen für eine nachhaltige, CO2-freie und erneuerbare Energieerzeugung. Mit der WindStream5 steht dem Markt eine 5 kW Kleinwindkraftanlage der neuesten Generation zur Verfügung, die speziell für die Anwendung in dezentralen Energieversorgungssystemen entwickelt wurde. Sie verbindet das Know-How der Windkraftanlagen aus der Megawatt-Klasse mit den hohen Ansprüchen an eine robuste und dennoch preisgünstige Kleinwindkraftanlage.

Hohe Leistung
Die WindStream5 wurde entwickelt, um das Windpotenzial optimal zu nutzen. Der zweistufige Generator, das optimierte Rotorblattprofil, die aktive Windnachführung und ein intelligentes Steuerungssystem sorgen für eine hochwertige Stromerzeugung.

Robustes Design
Die Komponenten des WindStream5 werden aus hochwertigen Materialien und von führenden Herstellern aus Deutschland geliefert und garantieren höchste Qualitätsstandards.

Geringe Geräuschemissionen
Für geringe Geräuschemissionen sorgen das optimierte aerodynamische Rotorblattprofil und ein Single-Frame-Konzept, das geräuscherzeugende Komponenten wie den Generator und das Getriebe in ein zentrales Aluminium-Gussgehäuse integriert.

Bodennahe Wartung
Minimaler Wartungsaufwand führt zu einem zuverlässigen Langzeitbetrieb der WindStream5. Alle Wartungsarbeiten können dank des Absenksystems ebenerdig durchgeführt werden, was die Wartungskosten sowie Ausfallzeiten drastisch reduziert.

Einfache Installation
Die kranlose Montage ermöglicht niedrigste Installationskosten und eine einfache Installation nur durch den Einsatz von Menschenkraft. 

Individuelle Gestaltung
Unternehmen können ihre Umwelt- und Klimabilanz verbessern und sich durch individuelle Farbgebungen von Gondel, Rotorblatt und Turm zukunftsorientiert und umweltbewusst positionieren – ein deutlicher Marketing- und Imagevorteil.

Name: Geodesic Wind Turbine
Description:
Hello! We would like to introduce our new wind power company.

Our company is a Korean-based wind power company founded by a Canadian-Korean inventor. Recently, we have registered a patent for an innovative new blade design for vertical axis wind turbines (VAWTs).

The biggest feature of our company is the blade design that enables efficient power generation at a low manufacturing cost. Our blade design combines the major lift-based approach of the Darrieus wind turbine and the drag-based approach of the Savonius wind turbine to create a more powerful and high-torque turbine than traditional designs.

Our turbine's structural frame is very strong and guarantees long-term use. We have applied a high-strength mechanism that can withstand the turbine's use even in the most challenging weather conditions, allowing users to use the turbine with peace of mind.

Our team is passionate about renewable energy and highly values the impact on the earth's environment. We believe that wind power can revolutionize the way electricity is produced and reduce our dependence on fossil fuels. By providing economic and efficient solutions, we aim to contribute to the growth of the renewable energy industry.

Name: ampStay
Description:
ampStay is an innovative wind turbine with narrow, cylindrical wings rotating around the backstay of sailing yachts. Wind energy is harvested by a narrow cylindrical rotor which is attached to and rotating around the backstay, the bracing from the stern to top of mast. ampStay is the only wind turbine worldwide which doesn't need a fixed mast because it uses a steel rope as rotor axis. 
Modern sailing yachts have lots of electrical consumers on board - from chartplotter to autopilot, refridgeration, coffee machine, water desalinator, chargers for notebooks, tablets and phones up to cabin lighting an air condition. Therefore power is needed, especially on tour and while anchoring in remote locations!
ampStay is whisper quiet, even at strong winds. By using the backstay, depending on the type of yacht, up to 10 metres rotor height are available. Especially in the
upper mast area, where the wind is stronger and more even than just above the deck, ampStay utilizes previously unused space for power generation. Unlike solar cells, electricity is also generated at high latitudes, at night and under overcast skies, making ampStay a perfect supplement to solar. ampStay may be operated up to 40kn wind speed and provides protection for more extreme wind situations. The stern of a yacht remains free and unblocked by any ugly additional mast which is mandatory for classic horizontal wind turbines. The appealing design elegantly matches the lines of a yacht and is a widely visible sign of sustainability. The rotor and most parts are fast and easy to mount and remove. The turbine is designed according to latest aerodynamic research to combine excellent efficiency with maximum running smoothness.
Supported by the Institute for renewable energy in Vienna the turbine has been tested and optimised under harsh conditions and is now ready for mass production to be selled worldwide.

Name: WindSTAR
Description:
WindSTAR is an NSF-funded Industry/University Cooperative Research Center for Wind Energy, Science, Technology and Research. A collaboration between UMass Lowell and the University of Texas at Dallas, the Center aims to solve the pressing needs of the wind industry.

WindSTAR brings the innovative research capabilities of leading universities to develop high-impact solutions to key industry challenges. We provide a platform for public agencies and companies to cost-effectively collaborate on shared, pre-competitive research topics by leveraging R&D investment to access world class facilities, faculty and graduate students.

WindSTAR’s goal is decrease cost and increase reliability at all stages of wind power plant development: component fabrication, array design, operations and maintenance. Our industry members include wind farm owner-operators, blade manufacturers, composite manufactures. Their priorities drive our research agenda – and train the next generation of wind industry innovators.

Od tamtej pory, po dziś dzień kompleksowo rozwiązujemy wszystkie problemy naszych klientów dotyczące elektrowni wiatrowych.

Na co dzień zajmujemy się głównie przeprowadzaniem skrupulatnie zaplanowanych przeglądów, napraw i usprawnień tych urządzeń. Poza tym oferujemy usługi z zakresu sprzedaży, kupna, montażu i demontażu turbin w Unii Europejskiej i poza nią. Nasza firma jest często zapraszana do współpracy jako wsparcie techniczne przy budowie nowych parków wiatrowych przez wiodące, światowe koncerny w tej branży.

Domeną Windkraft jest skuteczność, elastyczność i szybkie działanie, które pozwala zagwarantować klientom wysoką obsługę, sprawność urządzeń i oszczędność czasu.

We provide all the information you need to kickstart your career in the Wind Industry. From helping you select the right courses and training provider to CV writing and interview questions we provide a step by step guide on how to achieve your new role.

What we do:
- We will talk you through the different areas of the wind industry and work out which job role would suit you best. We can then provide all of the information on which training courses you will need and your local training centre. 

- We post continuous job adverts from wind turbine companies from all over the UK and Europe. We can then advise you on which jobs to apply for. 

- We can help develop your CV and cover letter to suit each job application and help get it submitted.

We are here from start to finish of applying for either your first job in the wind industry or if you are fancying a change within the industry.

Contract management
Getting a contract awarded may be a celebrated moment, but the difference between success and failure has yet to be made. We provide enhanced contract management skills and tools for optimising project execution, aimed at getting the best out of your contract by controlling risks and protecting your contractual position, but also by grasping opportunities.

Consultancy

Functions related to legal and contracts are specialist ones, demanding in practice and sometimes seen and treated as a vermiform appendix to the organisation. How do you deal with managing these functions? How do you optimize these roles within your organisation without immediately expanding resources.

Unlike traditional wind turbines, our design integrates an aerodynamic shroud or diffuser around the blades, which enhances airflow and increases efficiency by capturing more wind energy, even at lower speeds. Currently in the design phase, our focus is on creating compact, efficient turbines that offer a viable solution for generating clean energy in both urban and rural settings.

As we refine our design, we are committed to contributing to a more sustainable future by making wind energy more accessible and efficient for a wide range of applications.

Crée en 2024, EVO est le nouveau visage français de l’énergéticien allemand EnBW AG pour ses activités offshore sur le marché français et européen. 
Née de l’expertise franco-allemande, EVO est le fruit de la collaboration entre Valeco, producteur d’énergies renouvelables engagé depuis près de 30 ans dans la transition énergétique des territoires en France et EnBW AG, l’un des leaders européens d’énergies renouvelables.  

La création d’EnBW Valeco Offshore est le reflet de l’engagement majeur porté par EnBW pour la France et de sa volonté d’accompagner la filière de l’éolien en mer à se déployer en France. 

EVO s’appuie sur sa connaissance du marché français, de ses acteurs maritimes et littoraux depuis 2018, sur les compétences techniques de ses 300 collaborateurs dans l’éolien en mer, et sur l’ancrage territorial qui ont fait de Valeco sa renommée. 

EVO rayonne au plus près des façades maritimes françaises à Lorient, Nantes, Bordeaux, Montpellier et Marseille... 
Son siège social est basé à Paris.

Name: VUTTA ENERGY
Description:
Vutta Energy is a proudly South African, 100% black-owned renewable energy services company specialising in wind turbine construction, operations and maintenance. Based in the Eastern Cape, we support wind farm owners, IPPs, EPCs and OEMs with experienced technical teams across the full lifecycle of a wind project.  

We are part of the first generation of Wind Turbine Technicians in South Africa. Our directors started as technicians in the field, progressed through the ranks to be successful plant operators & managers, and now lead a team that understands wind farms from the ground up. This hands-on experience means we know what it takes to deliver safe, efficient and high-quality work on every turbine and every site, even under demanding conditions and tight project timelines.  

Our purpose is to maximise turbine performance and uptime while helping our clients reduce lifecycle costs, without compromising on safety or quality. As renewable energy becomes a key part of South Africa’s energy mix, we focus on sustainable, practical solutions that keep assets running optimally for the life of the plant and beyond, supporting long-term energy security and local economic growth.  

Our core services include mechanical and electrical wind turbine erection, main component exchanges, troubleshooting and repairs, initial service, commissioning, retrofits, planned maintenance, manpower solutions, asset management and plant hire for wind projects and remote power plants. Our teams are trained to follow strict safety, quality and environmental standards on every project.  

With highly skilled resources, flexible service packages and a strong local presence, Vutta Energy is your partner for safe, reliable and cost-effective wind turbine services across South Africa and beyond our borders.

Name: ŞAHLİN ENERJİ İNŞAAT SAN. VE TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.
Description:
Göktürk İnşaat, 2006 yılında kurulmuş ve 2011 yılında kurumsallaşma sürecine girmiş, çağın gereksinimlerine uyum sağlama amacıyla Selçuk Şahin Çiroğlu liderliğinde Şahlin Enerji İnşaat adını alarak faaliyetlerine devam etmiştir. 2012 yılında, grup çatısını Mersin'e taşıyan Şahlin Enerji İnşaat, konvansiyonel yapılar, sanayi yapıları, fabrika yapıları gibi farklı alanlarda çözüm ortağı olarak önemli projelere imza atmıştır.

Hızla gelişen ve sanayileşen dünyamızda artan enerji ihtiyacına paralel olarak, Şahlin Enerji İnşaat, rüzgar enerji santralleri konusunda uzmanlaşmış ve bu alanda birçok projeye öncülük etmiştir. Ülkemizdeki önemli rüzgar kaynaklarından birine sahip olması, şirketi rüzgardan elektrik üretme konusunda 2000'li yıllarda hızla büyüyen bir oyuncu haline getirmiştir. Şahlin Enerji İnşaat, günümüzde birçok projenin yapımına devam ederken, farklı bölgelerde yeni projelerin hazırlıklarını sürdürmektedir.

2006 yılından itibaren rüzgar enerji santralleri projelerine odaklanan Şahlin Enerji İnşaat, Best Akres Elektrik Üretim Nordex Enerji A.Ş'ye bağlı olarak Türkiye'nin ilk anahtar teslim rüzgar enerjisi projesini gerçekleştirmenin gururunu yaşamış ve sektörde etkili bir konuma gelmiştir.

Sanayi ve fabrika yapıları, özellikle rüzgar enerjisi sektöründe birçok süreci kademeli olarak aşmayı gerektirmektedir. Bu konuda uzman ekibi, geçmişten gelen bilgi ve tecrübesi ile Şahlin Enerji İnşaat, yatırımcılara yatırım yapacakları bölgelerde, lokasyon, harita, kamulaştırma, izinler gibi konularda bilgi ve tecrübelerini aktararak sadece inşaat taahhüt işlerini üstlenmekle kalmayıp, projenin her aşamasında yardım ve destek sağlamaktadır.

Şahlin Enerji İnşaat'ın üstlendiği tüm işler, deneyimli, bilgili ve her türlü iklim şartlarında çalışabilen bir ekip tarafından gerçekleştirilmektedir. İş güvenliği ve işçi sağlığı ilkelerini benimseyen şirket, yıllardır aynı işi yapmanın avantajını kullanarak projelerini başarıyla tamamlamaktadır.

Name: MSCA-ADOreD
Description:
Renewable power is one of the main drives to achieve carbon reduction and net-zero, and to meet the ambitious climate goals. In particular, offshore wind power in Europe has been developing at a rapid pace in recent years. Multi-Giga watts offshore wind farms with larger wind turbine power ratings, floating wind turbines installed in deeper water areas, and higher ratio of renewables integrated to existing power grids, are fundamentally changing power system operations and bringing new challenges and technical demands.
This industry-doctorate consortium, ADOreD, will recruit and train 15 Researchers by collaborating with 19 academic and industrial organisations. It aims to tackle the academic and technical challenges in the areas of transmission of offshore wind power to the AC grid by using power electronics-based AC/DC technologies. In doing so, it will equip the Researchers, through their PhD studies, with essential knowledge and skills to face fast energy transition in their future careers.
The project covers 3 key research aspects: offshore wind (including wind turbines, wind power collection, and wind farm design and control); DC technologies (including AC/DC converters, HVDC control and DC network operation and protection); and AC grid (including stability and control of AC grids dominated with converters under various control modes. The ADOreD consortium has excellent coverage of academic universities and industry organisations including manufacturers, energy utilities, system operators, consultancy and technology innovation centres. All the research questions in the project reflect industry needs; academic novelty and innovation will be reflected in the methodologies and solutions; and the research results will be disseminated directly to the industry partners’ products, grid operation and services. The outcomes of the project are both technologies and a talent pool to accelerate the deployment and grid integration of large-scale offshore wind power.

Name: Espace Eolien Developpement
Description:
Créée en 1992, la société Espace Eolien Développement (EED) est un bureau d'études privé spécialisé en énergie éolienne. EED a développé des fermes éoliennes, détenues et exploitées par des tiers, pour une capacité totale de plus de 200 MW soit près de 14% de la capacité installée en énergie éolienne en France à la fin 2006.

Le 26 mars 2007, dans le cadre de sa stratégie de développement dans les énergies renouvelables, l'opérateur d'électricité et de gaz Poweo a annoncé l'acquisition de EED. Ce rapprochement permet à Poweo d'être présent sur l'ensemble du cycle de développement d'un projet éolien, selon une approche intégrée cohérente avec sa stratégie industrielle, a déclaré le Groupe. Poweo viserait une capacité de production de 3.400 MW installée fin 2012, dont 600 MW provenant d'énergie renouvelable.

Le fondateur d'Espace Eolien Développement, Philippe BRUYERRE, ingénieur et historien de l'énergie éolienne, est décédé le 25 octobre 2024.

- Safe descent at all wind speeds and extremely wet weather conditions.
- Safe descent when nacelle is on fire.
- Always there where you need it, immediately ready to use.
- Pre-installed and fixed at the escape hatches, so cannot be missed.
- No time consuming preparation, just click on and go.
- No electricity required
- Multiple personnel can descend at the same time, Max. load system 564Kg. (Max. load 282Kg per hook/reel).
- In case of acute health problems/cardiac arrest a person can be safely on the ground within the 6 Golden minutes.
- Can be done with 1 hand (in case Injury has been sustained to other hand).
- Maintenance friendly, visual inspection and system-test, approx. 15Minutes.
- Long Lifespan >30 years.
- Lower costs of ownership compared with rope based rescue equipment.
- Easy installation, suitable for all wind turbines, on and offshore.
- Installation does not damage the nacelle-construction and does not interfere annual maintenance in the nacelle (No drilling required).
- Certified by DEKRA Germany EN341 Class-D, in compliance with ANSI Z359/CSA Z259.

Brings Compliance:
The Evacuator escape descent system brings compliance to the Official European Safety Standard for Wind Turbines EN50308,
Paragraph 4.2.2: “The descent device has to be fireproof enough to allow escape from the nacelle to the ground in the event of fire, it shall be suitable for the numbers of persons to be evacuated”.

Info:
www.evacuator.com
Info@evacuator.com

Name: Windworks
Description:
The pitch

Windworks created the world’s first real-time blade control system for wind turbine blades, empowering accessible and affordable clean energy. This technology uses on-board sensors and our in-house software to actively adjust the orientation of turbine blades in real-time, improving turbine performance, lifetime and electricity costs.

The pain

Over 95% of wind power comes from large, utility-scale turbines. At that scale, wind turbines offer the lowest cost of electricity of energy system. At smaller commercial and industrial scales, there are no economically viable wind turbines. 

Several stakeholders suffer from the lack of on-site clean power production. Currently, the only sustainable on-site power option is photovoltaics, which produce 67% less electricity in winter compared to summer. 

Energy-intensive industries, communities, and farmers must rely on carbon-intensive and expensive grid power or fossil-based generators to meet their power needs. They face increasingly volatile and high energy costs, and regulations regarding their carbon emissions. 

Our unique solution

We built the first real-time blade control system for wind turbine blades that respond to local wind conditions using on-board sensors and a data-driven algorithm. Smart vertical-axis wind turbines are quiet, fauna friendly and require only a third of the space compared to traditional turbines. They provide socially attractive wind power and thrive in a wide spectrum of wind conditions, enabling on-site power production. Our laboratory proof-of-concept achieved industry-leading efficiency, with power coefficients surpassing the 0.5 mark, and demonstrated resilience to strong wind conditions.

The project will be built in stages and has received all the necessary approvals to develop up to 46 wind turbines, a solar farm and battery energy storage.

The first of the project planned for construction is a 121MW wind farm.

 Lacour initiated the development and have obtained all the State and Federal approvals for the project.

The challenging environment of the Pentland Firth provides ideal testing conditions to demonstrate new floating wind technologies – a core aim of the project. Name: ERG France
Description:
ERG France fait partie du groupe ERG, l’un des principaux opérateurs indépendants sur le marché de l'électricité produite à partir de sources propres et renouvelables, basée en Italie et cotée à la Bourse de Milan.
En France, nous disposons d'une capacité installée de 672 MW (éolien et solaire) et un pipeline de plus de 900 MW de nouveaux projets. Ayant une approche industrielle intégrée du développement et de la gestion de ses actifs, nos équipes administrent toutes les activités autour de l'installation d'éoliennes sur un territoire. Le développement des projets éoliens s’appuie sur un engagement fort avec les territoires, en assurant de manière transparente l’implication des collectivités locales à chacune des étapes de leur déploiement. Via l'information et le dialogue avec les acteurs locaux, nous visons à améliorer l'acceptation sociale et locale de l’ensemble des projets.

Name: WIND my ROOF
Description: WIND my ROOF apporte l’énergie locale et propre dans les bâtiments, grâce à la WindBox, une solution qui allie éolienne de toit et panneaux solaires. Légère, puissante et discrète, elle permet d’accroître l’autonomie énergétique des bâtiments et participe à la transition énergétique du secteur.

Name: Energy Services - Blue Water Shipping
Description:
We support the Original Equipment Manufacturers to accelerate the development of wind farms we offer fully integrated wind turbine deployment service. Turnkey services covering full scope of logistics, assembly, disassembly and installation of wind turbines.

With long-term logistics and cargo handling expertise in conjunction with highly skilled manpower in the Wind industry, we create an integrated service and offering coverage of all aspects of wind turbine deployment.

We hold comprehensive experience and expertise in providing our services with strong and flexible solutions meeting the increasing demands of the industry.

Our dedicated service covers the entire renewables project:
- Tools & Equipment 
- Manpower & Construction
- Transport & Logistics
- HSSEQ 

For recruitment go to https://bwes.kariera.pro/

Name: Forte Renewables
Description:
Technical Advisors & Risk Managers: Onshore Wind – Offshore Wind - Solar PV

Established in Amsterdam in 2012, Forte Renewables stands as a beacon of expertise in Technical Advisory, Owners Engineering, and top-tier Project Management services on an international scale.

We support investors in achieving their renewable energy project goals. From meticulously assessing Technical Due Diligence to steering the intricacies of Engineering, Procurement, and Construction stages, we're committed to ensuring projects not only meet but exceed industry standards.

With Forte Renewables by your side, expect a seamless journey through each phase, where our dedicated professionals harness their unrivaled industry knowledge and meticulous attention to detail to propel your projects to unparalleled success.

Name: InterBolt
Description:
InterBolt Intelligent Bolting.

Our technology provides bolt load measurements to technicians on site to ensure bolts are tightened accurately and efficiently. Through our IOT platform, bolt load data is also available to a remote user, eliminating the need for costly, disruptive and inefficient manual bolt inspection. 

Ultimately, we enable Operators to implement a Predictive Maintenance regime to minimise maintenance costs, asset downtime and health & safety risks.

Name: V2i Energia S.A.
Description:
V2i Energia S.A. é uma sociedade anônima de capital fechado com sede no Rio de Janeiro. 
Conta atualmente com dez
ativos em operação, sendo quatro transmissoras (LEST , ARCOVERDE, VINEYARDS e TPAE), Parque Eólico de Mangue Seco I, III e IV e três PCHS (Colino I, Colino II e Cachoeira da Lixa).
