Name: La Gan Offshore Wind Farm
Description:
The La Gan Offshore Wind Farm is located off the coast of Lam Dong (formerly Binh Thuan), Vietnam.  With an expected capacity of 3.5 GW, the project aims to be one of the first large-scale offshore wind farms in Vietnam. The project will implement the highest international standards, using the most advanced wind-power technology.
The La Gan project is being developed by Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP) and local partners, and managed by offshore wind experts Copenhagen Offshore Partners (COP). 
Our goal is to secure Vietnam's long-term energy needs and support the development of local industry in a sustainable way.

Dự án điện gió ngoài khơi La Gàn nằm ở ngoài khơi Lâm Đồng (trước đây là Thuận), Việt Nam. Với công suất dự kiến 3,5 GW, dự án hướng tới mục tiêu trở thành một trong những trang trại điện gió ngoài khơi quy mô lớn đầu tiên tại Việt Nam. Dự án được thực hiện theo tiêu chuẩn quốc tế cao nhất, sử dụng công nghệ điện gió tiên tiến nhất. 
Dự án điện gió ngoài khơi La Gàn được phát triển bởi Tập đoàn Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP) cùng các đối tác trong nước, và được quản lý bởi các chuyên gia về điện gió ngoài khơi của Copenhagen Offshore Partners (COP).
Dự án điện gió ngoài khơi La Gàn hướng tới đảm bảo nhu cầu năng lượng dài hạn của Việt Nam và hỗ trợ phát triển ngành công nghiệp địa phương một cách bền vững.

Name: Quinto Energy . H2V
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada no desenvolvimento de projetos de energias renováveis em larga escala, atuando no mercado há 10 anos. Em nosso amplo portfólio desenvolvemos 5 projetos híbridos de energia eólica e solar na Bahia.

Com o objetivo de ofertar o menor custo de energia gerada em nossos projetos, incluindo a mais alta qualidade técnica, estamos projetando complexos com potencial para nos tornar referência mundial em energia eólica e energia solar. Hoje nosso grande objetivo é obter o hidrogênio verde mais competitivo do mercado, contribuindo para descarbonização e sustentabilidade do Brasil e do mundo.

Atualmente temos mais de 14 GW em portfólio de projetos, resultando em 2,8 mil propriedades arrendadas, que totalizam 256 mil hectares, beneficiando cerca de 9 mil arrendantes distribuídos em 17 municípios da Bahia.

Name: Keep Wind
Description:
KEEP WIND es el principio de un largo camino. Con más de 20 años de experiencia en análisis de datos y gestión de activos eólicos. Nace la necesidad de analizar y auditar los datos que nos entrega la tecnología a través de sus SCADA y gestores de informes.
Hemos analizado datos en activos eólicos en más de 10 países.

Name: Thistle Wind Partners
Description:
Thistle Wind Partners (TWP) is an Edinburgh-based business, founded with a focus on Scottish offshore wind development.

We are currently developing 2GW of floating and fixed-foundation offshore wind capacity at our ScotWind leasing sites: the Ayre Offshore Wind Farm (Orkney) and the Bowdun Offshore Wind Farm (Aberdeenshire).

Our founder companies – DEME Group, Qair, and Aspiravi – bring experience from a global renewables portfolio that is distinguished by offshore engineering excellence and a track record of delivering local economic benefit.

Name: REMO
Description:
REMO has an established track record of successfully completing multiple scopes of technically challenging and complex installation packages of work for both onshore and offshore renewable wind projects across the UK, Europe and Australia. 

REMO was established with a focus and aim of supplying the highest quality, technically experienced and versatile technicians and teams for a variety of different work scopes and packages within the onshore and offshore renewables wind energy sector. 

The company was founded on strong and firm beliefs which form its foundations around its values. Its focus on its people.

REMO people-power portfolio is comprised of technicians who the business select both personally and technically. Its people have a rich history of working project experience which ensures a “fully-dedicated and highly-skilled team” capable of delivering to the highest of standards for themselves, the company and the client.

Name: Renoair Energias Renováveis
Description:
Nossa empresa desenvolve soluções específicas para cada etapa da prospecção de parques eólicos.

Desde a avaliação inicial do potencial eólico, passando pela construção, montagem e manutenção das estruturas anemométricas e calibração dos equipamentos.

Nossa estratégia integrada proporciona resultados efetivos e de alta qualidade.

Name: Skyborn Renewables Taiwan
Description:
Skyborn Renewables is driving global decarbonisation by accelerating offshore wind energy across the world. 

We believe offshore wind is a cornerstone of the clean energy transition and an enabler to achieve net-zero targets, ensure energy security, and a sustainable energy supply for future generations. Skyborn Renewables is a pioneer and leading offshore wind developer and operator with more than 20 years’ experience and a track record of approx. 7 GW developed around the globe to date. Our capabilities cover the entire offshore wind value chain, including greenfield development, engineering and design, procurement, financing, construction management and asset management.

Skyborn's portfolio includes a global pipeline of > 30 GW in various stages of development. Headquartered in Bremen, Germany, the company is present in 15 European and APAC markets.

Name: TorkCheck
Description:
TorkCheck which is a company of Mağdenli is established to be a technical and commercial solution partner to the customers with the principles such as reliability & honesty, experience and knowledge.
The Company, possessing experienced and qualified teams, operates with the principle that all services are performed according to HSE, quality & environment management rules , to be on the site and complete the work as planned.

Name: SHIMA
Description:
Nuestros inicios estuvieron vinculados a la industria y la construcción. Atentos a la diversificación de la matriz energética nacional, comenzamos en 2016 proyectos relacionados con las Energías Renovables.

Nos especializamos en el sector Eólico, donde somos un referente a nivel nacional e internacional.

Nuestro compromiso de sostenibilidad nos impulsa a trabajar día a día, conscientes del impacto que generan nuestras actividades en el ambiente, y con ello, la búsqueda de la mejora continua incesante de todos nuestros productos y servicios.

Trabajamos con esfuerzo y un enfoque estratégico hacia la excelencia; disponiendo del conocimiento, los medios técnicos y excelentes profesionales que nos permiten alcanzar los máximos resultados para nuestros clientes siempre orientados a la creación de valor, la protección del ambiente y la vigilancia tanto de la salud como la seguridad.

Name: Anma Offshore Wind
Description:
Anma Offshore Wind Farm is located in Yeonggwang Municipality, South Jeolla Province, South Korea. The 528MW project is expected to be amongst the first utility-scale project in Korea to begin construction.  

Our vision is to bring clean, renewable energy and opportunities to the local community of the Yeonggwang Municipality, South Korea. We believe in working closely with the community and local suppliers. 

As a workplace, we have a people-first approach. We are a multicultural team and believe in work-life balance. Our culture is based on trust, respect, and flexibility. We provide a place to develop new skills and grow – professionally and personally – while supporting renewable energy and a better future for South Korea. 

If you want to know more about our career opportunities, get in touch. 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

안마 해상풍력 발전단지(Anma Offshore Wind Farm)는 전라남도 영광군에 위치해 있습니다. 528MW 규모를 갖는 본 프로젝트는 대한민국 내에서 최초로 착공하는 utility-scale(터빈 1기당 100kW 이상의 발전량) 프로젝트 중 하나가 될 것으로 기대되고 있습니다.

우리의 비전은 청정한 재생에너지와 더불어 지역발전의 기회를 영광군과 그 지역사회에 보급하는데 있습니다. 해당 지역의 공급업체를 포함한 지역사회와 긴밀하게 협력할 수 있을 것으로 기대합니다. 

AWC에서는 일보다 사람이 먼저입니다. 우리는 다문화로 구성된 팀으로서 일과 개인 삶의 균형(work-life balance)을 존중합니다. 우리의 문화는 신뢰와 존중, 그리고 연성에 기반을 두고 있습니다. AWC는 신재생에너지에 대한 지원을 통해 대한민국의 보다 나은 미래에 기여하는 동시에, 구성원의 개인적 그리고 직무에 관한 전문적 역량을 새롭게 발전시키고 성장할 수 있도록 기회를 제공합니다.

당사의 채용 기회에 대해 더 알고 싶으시다면, 지속적으로 관심갖고 지켜봐 주시기 바랍니다!

Name: Ventos de São Zacarias
Description:
Ventos de Sao Zacarias (“VSZ”) is building a wind farm located in the municipalities of Simões - Piauí and Araripina - Pernambuco in Northeastern Brazil. With its commercial operations planned for 2024 and a generation capacity of 456 MW, the project will be built in one of the largest wind farm clusters in Latin America.

VSZ has entered into a Turbine Supply Agreement and associated long term Service and Availability Agreement with the Nordex Group for 80 N163/[5.X]MW Wind Turbine Generators. The Nordex Group is a global player and one of the world’s largest wind turbine manufacturers.

Ventos de Sao Zacarias is a joint venture of Macquarie Asset Management's and Hydro - REIN, a company from Norsk Hydro's group. 

- About MAM

Macquarie Asset Management (MAM) is a global asset manager, integrated across public and private markets. 

Trusted by institutions, governments, foundations and individuals to manage approximately $A938.31 billion in assets, MAM provides a diverse range of investment solutions including real assets, real estate, credit and equities & multi-asset.

- About Hydro Rein

Hydro Rein was established in 2021 as part of Hydro’s strategy to grow in renewables. The company aims at becoming the preferred supplier of renewable power and other energy solutions for industrial clients. 

Hydro Rein has a significant pipeline of wind and solar projects in Brazil and the Nordics for long-term power supply to Hydro and other industrial offtakers. Hydro Rein is also developing a range of energy solutions to assist industries with the management and optimization of its energy consumption and storage behind-the-meter. (www.hydro.com)

Windenergieerzeuger mit 90 % der in Österreich installierten Windkraftleistung sowie alle namhaften Anlagenerzeuger und viele Firmen aus der Dienstleistungs- und Zulieferbranche gehören zu unseren Mitgliedern.

Name: Orchid
Description: Orchid is a leading provider of high quality Installation, Operation and Maintenance services for wind turbines. We operate all over the world

Name: BlueNewables
Description:
BlueNewables is an engineering consultancy at the cutting edge of the innovation within the blue economy. We support the marine renewables energy sector with technical know-how, advice and holistic approach.
We develop offshore technologies and we also provide engineering services. Our specialties are related to offhore engineering and marine operations, hydrodynamics, and general development of offshore wind and solar infraestructures analysing its technical and economical feasibility.

Name: SPIE WIND LATAM
Description: Empresa del rubro eólico especialista en mantenimiento

Name: Eolmed
Description: Situé en mer Méditerranée au large de Gruissan (Aude), le parc pilote Eolmed consiste en l’implantation de trois éoliennes d’une puissance unitaire de 10 MW installées sur des flotteurs en acier à plus de 18 km des côtes.

Name: Venwind Refex Power Limited
Description: Venwind Refex aims to transform wind energy in India through innovation and sustainability, delivering advanced turbine technology and manufacturing excellence. Venwind Refex strives to be a leading wind turbine OEM in India, combining global expertise with local insight. Our advanced facility is manufacturing 5.3 MW turbines, aiming for a 5 GW annual capacity.

Name: Wind Energy | Uzbekistan
Description: Promoting investments and businesses in wind energy industry of Uzbekistan

Name: IberBlue Wind
Description:
IberBlue Wind es una joint venture especializada en la promoción de proyectos de parques eólicos marinos ﬂotantes que opera en el mercado ibérico. Integrada por la compañía irlandesa Simply Blue Group, líder en energía eólica marina ﬂotante; y las empresas españolas Proes Consultores, división de ingeniería del Grupo Amper, y FF New Energy Ventures (FF NEV), promotora de proyectos renovables, su objetivo es contribuir a que España y Portugal se posicionen como líderes en este campo de las energías renovables.

Gracias a su conocimiento del mercado y a su amplia experiencia en todos los ámbitos del desarrollo de parques eólicos marinos, IberBlue Wind promueve la instalación de aerogeneradores flotantes que aprovechan la mayor intensidad del viento en alta mar para generar electricidad limpia y eficiente de origen renovable.   

IberBlue Wind estudia oportunidades de generación de alrededor de 2 GW de energía eólica marina en la península a través de un modelo operativo especializado en la promoción de parques eólicos de más de 500 MW.

Name: wpd Italia
Description:
Sviluppo delle energie sostenibili, know-how avanzato, innovazione tecnologica, attenzione alle esigenze delle comunità locali . Questi i quattro fattori chiave grazie ai quali il marchio wpd, presente in Italia dal 2006, è diventato anche nel nostro Paese uno dei punti di riferimento nel settore chiave delle energie rinnovabili, in particolare dell’eolico.

Forte dell’esperienza e della competenza internazionale del Gruppo wpd, wpd Italia opera con un doppio approccio: da un lato con lo sviluppo di progetti “green field”, dall’altro con l’acquisizione di progetti già autorizzati per portarli a realizzazione .

In particolare, lo sviluppo di progetti in proprio rappresenta una delle attività specifiche di wpd Italia, che si avvale, a seconda dei casi, anche del supporto di collaboratori esterni ben inseriti nel territorio che hanno il compito di contribuire a integrare le esigenze peculiari delle varie realtà locali con quelle del progetto specifico. 
Per trasformare la forza degli elementi naturali, a partire dal vento, in energia pulita e sviluppo economico sostenibile. 

Unendo da un lato le capacità finanziarie, gestionali e tecnologiche, dall’altro l’attività di acquisizione di progetti in via di sviluppo o autorizzati, wpd Italia si pone come il partner industriale ideale per affrontare la sfida dell’energia rinnovabile. Nell’interesse di tutti gli attori coinvolti, a partire da quelli del territorio.

In Italia, così come nel resto dei paesi in cui è presente, wpd lavora prestando attenzione allo sviluppo del territorio con progetti che vedono coinvolte le comunità locali attraverso attività di valorizzazione del territorio.

Name: CAREWIND
Description: Wind turbine Transportation, Installation and Crane Services

Name: FOWT Conference

Name: Ekwil
Description:
Born from a collaboration between SBM Offshore and Technip Energies, Ekwil represents an unparalleled commitment and ambition for growth in Floating Offshore Wind power. The name Ekwil symbolizes the equilibrium we achieve between our purpose, our people, our planet, and our partners.

Leveraging the industry-leading expertise of SBM Offshore and Technip Energies, we offer a diversified and expanding range of solutions, including Tension Leg and Semi-submersible platforms, tailored to meet the evolving needs of energy customers worldwide. Our Float4Wind tension-leg and INO semi-submersible technologies provide flexibility and adaptability to the Floating Offshore Wind market.

Our core team of 40 specialists, backed by the talented resources of both companies, possesses unrivalled experience and expertise. This allows us to consistently deliver excellence and drive purposeful technological advancement in the Floating Offshore Wind sector to unlock value across the entire Engineering, Procurement, Construction, and Installation (EPCI) lifecycle.

Name: Ukrainian Wind Energy Association
Description:
UWEA is All-Ukrainian non-profit, public organisation aimed at promoting wind energy technologies and ensuring wind energy industry’s interests on the national and international levels. As of 2022, we unite 84 companies from 14 countries including manufacturers, developers, lawyers, ecologists as well as investment, logistics and other companies forming full wind value chain. We also unite different scientific and financial institutions. 

The UWEA links wind power project developers, wind power equipment manufacturers and suppliers, utilities, construction companies, scientists and researches, lawyers, NGOs, consumers and others involved in the wind industry – one of the world’s fastest growing energy industries. 

The Ukrainian Wind Energy Association cooperates with various national, regional and local authorities. The UWEA contributes greatly to information and experience exchange with all stakeholders. 

The UWEA is a proven, effective advocate for Ukrainian wind industry and it continues to mature along with the industry. 

The Ukrainian Wind Energy Association is a member of the World Wind Energy Association  (WWEA) and the European Wind Energy Association (EWEA).

Name: Windtek Global
Description:
Windtek is a group of companies established in Pakistan & United Arab Emirates. Windtek Group is providing the Installation, Operation & Maintenance and Field Services to Wind Power industry.

Our Group comprises of very talented pool of Engineers, Technicians & Riggers, who are capable to get the work done in most cost effective and efficient manner.

Name: BlueFloat Energy Australia
Description:
BlueFloat Energy Australia is leading the deployment of offshore wind in Australia. Our portfolio of projects in Victoria and New South Wales are at the forefront of the energy transition, delivering our vision of decarbonisation and regional economic growth. 

A global developer of offshore wind projects across the world, BlueFloat Energy brings global expertise in the design, financing, and construction of offshore wind to local projects in the Gippsland, Hunter, Illawarra and Portland regions.

Name: WORLDSE | Soluções Energéticas
Description:
A energia é a força que nos conecta ao mundo. E a nossa missão é tornar essa conexão mais barata e consciente. 

Com os serviços da World SE você tem a liberdade de escolher a sua fornecedora de energia, podendo optar por opções mais sustentáveis, com flexibilidade para diferentes contratos e economia de até 30% na sua conta de energia.

Conheça nosso site e repense seus custos com mais energia:

Name: Coffeeoffshore
Description:
Coffeoffshore is a vibrant platform dedicated to sharing knowledge about offshore wind farms in an engaging and accessible way. By combining captivating visuals with personal experiences and in-depth research, Coffeoffshore aims to demystify this dynamic field and make it more understandable for everyone. 

Believing that learning is the foundation of growth, Coffeoffshore empowers individuals to deepen their understanding and actively contribute to the advancement of offshore wind energy. The platform fosters continuous improvement, enhancing its own expertise while inspiring others to embark on their own learning journeys.

Coffeoffshore embraces the idea that growth is essential to life, igniting a passion for exploration and driving positive change in the world of offshore wind energy. Through its unique approach, Coffeoffshore is not just a source of information but a community that inspires curiosity and innovation in renewable energy.

Name: NCT Offshore A/S
Description:
Our DNA:
At NCT Offshore A/S we focus on safety, reliability, innovation & adaptability and pursue a strong team spirit and entrepreneurial company culture.

We want to be the best and most reliable in all aspects which shows throughout the company - from the administrative employee to the one on deck, we always focus on completing the job to mutual satisfaction.

CABLE INSTALLATION | TRENCHING/ROV | GEOTECHNICAL SUPPORT | SURVEYS | INSPECTIONS | WINDFARM | OIL & GAS | WALK TO WORK

Name: Windcredible
Description:
At Windcredible we are building micro wind turbines for producing energy anywhere the wind blows.
Our vertical design is efficient, safe and silent, especially designed for urban applications.

Name: Gruppo Hope
Description: Il Gruppo Hope, con tre sedi operative in Puglia e una a Milano, è attivamente impegnato nello sviluppo di impianti per la produzione di energia rinnovabile su scala industriale. Forte di una pipeline progettuale pari a 6 GW, il Gruppo persegue l’ambizioso obiettivo di affermarsi come Independent Power Producer di riferimento nel panorama nazionale. Al centro della propria strategia industriale vi è il Mezzogiorno, considerato non solo come territorio strategico per lo sviluppo delle fonti rinnovabili, ma anche come polo d’eccellenza e base operativa privilegiata per i professionisti del settore energetico.

Name: GREEN WORK TECHNOLOGY
Description: GREEWORK TECHNOLOGY es una empresa de servicios del sector eólico, que ofrece una amplia gama de servicios para los aerogeneradores, desde el mantenimiento y reparación eólicas hasta la realización de actuaciones, auditorías e inspecciones en campo.certificados en ISo 9001:2015. ISo14001:2015. ISo 45001:2018

Name: SPIE WIND North America
Description:
Founded in 2015 in response to the changing challenges of high-quality and increasingly digital industrial services, ROBUR now ranks among the top 10 industrial service providers in Germany with 20 companies and sales of approx. EUR 200 million in 2019 and is rapidly establishing global presence. 
Both the financing and the leadership of the group are characterized by partnership and entrepreneurialism. Our member companies benefit from the size and internationality of the group and can leverage sales, capacity utilization and management synergies.

More than 2,000 colleagues globally work in the wind, water, energy, industrials and process industries. As expert partners for our customers, we create holistic solutions from the planning to implementation, to operation and maintenance, to relocation and decommissioning and support our customers with digital and automation solutions in shaping their digital transformation.

Name: Windar Brasil
Description:
A Windar Brasil, originalmente fundada como Torrebras, foi a segunda fábrica internacional construída pela Windar Renovables em 2013.
Com o intuito de atender o mercado nacional e cobrir a demanda do mercado hispano-americano, posiciona-se como um dos principais centros de fabricação de turbinas eólicas onshore do mundo.

Name: FU Enerji
Description:
A unique experience worldwide!

Fu Energy was established in 2020 to provide sustainable energy to more people and to fill the gaps in the rapidly growing energy sector in a professional manner. Fu Energy, which was established in Izmir with its main fields of activity covering Solar and Wind Power plants, provides services in Kenya, Kosovo, Israel, Kazakhstan, Montenegro, Azerbaijan etc.

Taking our motivation from “trust, quality and speed”, we have delivered solar and wind energy modules to many of our customers that we actively serve in 6 countries, cumulatively, to meet their clean and green energy needs. We have taken our place among the most preferred energy companies because we provide the best possible value and service to our customers with our experienced field and management team that will make this mission a reality. By combining the modules and system solutions we offer with superior quality, we have succeeded in delivering our energy projects to consistently high production values and return on investment.

Our main field of activity is wind turbines. In the last 2 years, we have provided service in the maintenance & repair, installation and commissioning of more than 300 wind turbines. Fu Energy, which is always a part of the solution rather than the problem, continues to overgrow to carry ‘cleaner energy’ to the future.

How About Joining Our Team?

Would you like to be part of a dynamic and exciting team? We would be delighted to have you with us! Send your resume to the email address below and take your first step on this journey! Become a part of our team!

To apply: info@fuenerji.com
               www.fuenerji.com

Name: Jupiter Bach
Description:
Jupiter Bach is 100% dedicated to providing end-to-end solutions for Wind. As the global leader in nacelle and spinner covers, we’ve delivered composite solutions for over 70,000 turbines worldwide - both onshore and offshore.

As a full-scope partner to the world’s leading wind turbine OEMs, we support the entire lifecycle of composite nacelle and spinner covers – from engineering design to large scale manufacturing to just-in-time delivery. Our engineers work closely with customers to ensure that our solutions meet structural, aerodynamic, and aesthetic requirements, while optimizing for production scale.

Our services extend into smart assembly services e.g. packaging optimization, assembling composite panels, and integrated logistics support – streamlining our customers’ supply chains and reducing overall cost and complexity. We’re here to help bring turbines to market faster, more reliably, and more sustainably.

Name: Altus Wind d.o.o.
Description:
Altus Wind is a new company in the field of the wind industry, established in 2020 in Maribor, Slovenia. The company is mainly engaged in rotor blade inspections and repairs. Our technicians are all well-qualified personnel, who perform their work conscientiously and with all the care required of them by the nature of their work, their love for their work, and, of course, the regulations of organizations such as GWO and IRATA.

As a company, we strive to perform work at the highest possible level, and at the same time to maintain and grow as a worker-friendly company that ensures high-quality standards both in the field and at our headquarters.

Name: Cerulean Winds
Description:
Our aim is to lead on scaled floating wind. We produce and deliver green energy direct to the industrial user for decarbonisation.

Cerulean is a green infrastructure developer founded by Dan Jackson and Mark Dixon, who have together, over 25 years, led large scale offshore infrastructure developments. We have a market funded infrastructure construct to deliver integrated floating wind and hydrogen developments at scale.  

As a new type of energy company we are delivering on the challenges set by the floating wind environment. We are acquiring floating wind licences, which will allow us to rapidly decarbonise existing offshore assets, benefitting local communities, create thousands of clean energy jobs and provide a significant export supply.  

We aim to bring floating wind to market rapidly on an industrial scale, meaningfully contributing to renewable energy supply and supporting net zero targets. Our competitive advantage in this fast moving and emerging market is our unique and differentiated business construct utilising integrated infrastructure delivery and finance and our proven track record in similar scaled offshore developments.  

Licence Owner – As a licence owner we are acquiring licences for large scale energy generation in high capacity offshore areas.

Developer – as a developer we are using our own specific commercial construct with our trusted partners to accelerate through the build phases efficiently and on schedule.
 
Producer – Our ambition is to generate 3 – 5GW within 5 years through floating wind with strong and steady returns to investors.

Name: Southern Lifting and Hoisting LLC
Description:
YOUR TRUSTED WORKSITE PARTNER SINCE 2006

At Southern Lifting & Hoisting, we’ve been dedicated to simplifying worksite challenges since day one. Founded with a mission to deliver dependable, efficient solutions, we’ve grown our offerings over the years to become your go-to provider for lifting, hauling, and logistics. With a team of skilled operators and a wealth of industry experience, we pride ourselves on delivering innovative solutions that streamline operations across various sectors. Let us be the partner that takes the complexity out of your worksite.

A DEEP COMMITMENT TO SAFETY

From the start, Southern Lifting & Hoisting has made safety our top priority. We don't just adhere to safety standards—we’ve built our culture around them. Every employee, from day one, is fully integrated into our safety-first mindset, which we nurture and strengthen throughout their career with us. Our exceptional safety records speak volumes, reflecting our unwavering commitment to ensuring that safety isn’t just a policy—it’s a way of life.

We believe that no job is worth compromising safety. Every team member is empowered to uphold a culture where safety is everyone's responsibility, starting with each individual.

UNMATCHED INDUSTRY EXPERTISE

Since our inception, we’ve partnered with a wide range of industries, and it's our extensive experience that sets us apart. We bring deep expertise in:

 Renewable Energy
 Oil & Gas
 Civil Construction
 HVAC/Air Handling
 Natural Gas Compression
 Heavy Industrial/EPC
 And More

Each industry comes with its own set of challenges, and our proven track record of delivering tailored, innovative solutions ensures that our clients' needs are not just met, but exceeded. When it comes to lifting, hoisting, and logistics, experience truly makes the difference, and we’re here to show you how.

Name: Southerly Ten
Description:
Southerly Ten is a specialist offshore wind energy developer for Australia and New Zealand, from the team behind Star of the South and backed by Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP).

Our mission is to advance a local offshore wind industry and leave a positive legacy of clean energy for future generations. 

Our experienced team are based across Melbourne, Sydney, Gippsland, Newcastle and New Zealand, with access to energy specialists worldwide through CIP’s global network.

Name: ROBUR USA
Description:
Founded in 2015 in response to the changing challenges of high-quality and increasingly digital industrial services, ROBUR now ranks among the top 10 industrial service providers in Germany with 20 companies and sales of approx. EUR 200 million in 2019 and is rapidly establishing global presence. 
Both the financing and the leadership of the group are characterized by partnership and entrepreneurialism. Our member companies benefit from the size and internationality of the group and can leverage sales, capacity utilization and management synergies.

More than 2,000 colleagues globally work in the wind, water, energy, industrials and process industries. As expert partners for our customers, we create holistic solutions from the planning to implementation, to operation and maintenance, to relocation and decommissioning and support our customers with digital and automation solutions in shaping their digital transformation.

Name: GalernaWind
Description:
Soluciones y servicios para proyectos renovables.
Galerna Wind ofrece soluciones y servicios para proyectos renovables respondiendo a las necesidades de cada cliente.

Está formada por profesionales con dilatada experiencia en el sector, tanto a nivel nacional como internacional, con el objetivo de estar a la vanguardia en innovación y comprometidos con la excelencia.

*SERVICIOS*

CONSULTORÍA 
• Estudio de proyectos previos a ejecución
• Estudio de los recursos necesarios para el proyecto y optimización de costes
• Seguimiento detallado de las  diferentes fases del proyecto
• Inspecciones previas a PEM
• Inspecciones finales antes de firma del traspaso

SUPERVISIÓN

• Supervisión civil 
• Supervisión de montaje electro-mecánico
• Supervisión de logística 
• Supervisión de puesta en marcha
• Inspecciones de calidad

MONTAJE, OPERACIÓN Y MANTENIMIENTO

• Servicios de mantenimiento correctivo, estándar y especial
• Retrofits
• Remates generales y punch list finales
• Apoyo a montaje y cableado de las turbinas

Name: GBM Works
Description:
GBM Works has expertise in controlled fluidization of soils and other techniques that play a role in foundations near- and offshore. 

For silent installations of structures  near- and offshore, GBM Works offers innovative technologies which enable contractors and developers a sustainable approach of their projects. A silent and cost-effective method and machines for installing windturbine foundations offshore is our goal.

Name: Belgian Offshore Cluster vzw
Description:
MISSION
The Belgian Offshore Cluster or BOC wants to be the aggregator to defend the interests of the Belgian offshore industry and to spread our profound knowledge and experience. 

SCOPE
Belgian companies working in the Offshore Industry are worldwide leaders and have the knowledge and technology to grow. There is however a still an untapped potential to grow both locally and internationally. 

VISION
Therefore, the BOC wants to create a wide and independant (industrial) platform which maintains the necessary relationships between our sector, governments and international organisations.

Name: ENERG GROUP
Description:
ENERG Group nace con la misión de brindar servicios de primer nivel para el sector de energías renovables, combinando calidad técnica, innovación constante y una ejecución ágil y responsable.

Nuestra visión es ser reconocidos como la empresa referente en servicios energéticos por nuestro compromiso con la excelencia, la rapidez de respuesta y la adaptabilidad a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Cada acción que emprendemos está guiada por valores sólidos: seriedad profesional, calidad sin concesiones, innovación permanente y respeto por el medio ambiente.

Name: Energiequelle Finland
Description:
Energiequelle on kansainvälinen hankekehittäjä alanaan suunnitella, rakentaa ja hallinnoida tuuli-, biokaasu- ja aurinkovoimaloita, sähköasemia sekä energian varastointijärjestelmiä.

Yhtiö perustettiin Saksassa vuonna 1997, jonka jälkeen Energiequelle on kasvanut vakaasti lukeutuen tätä nykyä alansa johtaviin yrityksiin. Olemme rakentaneet yhteensä yli 750 voimalaitosta, joiden yhteenlaskettu kapasiteetti on noin 1500 MW.

Energiequelle laajensi toimintaansa Suomeen alkuvuodesta 2016, jolloin yhtiön perustama tytäryhtiö Energiequelle Oy aloitti toimintansa Helsingissä. Yritys työllistää tällä hetkellä yli 450 henkilöä, joista yli 30 työskentelee Energiequelle Oy:n toimistossa Helsingissä tai muualla Suomessa.

Energiequellellä on Suomessa kolme tuotannossa olevaa tuulivoimapuistoa: Pyhäjoella, Soinissa ja Maalahdessa, joiden lisäksi Torvenkylän (Kalajoki) ja Lumivaaran (Hyrynsalmi) tuulivoimapuistojen rakennustyöt ovat parhaillaan käynnissä. Meillä on myös eri vaiheissa olevia, itsenäisesti ja yhdessä yhteistyökumppaneidemme kanssa kehitettyjä tuulivoimahankkeita, joiden yhteisteho on noin 2500 MW. Etsimme aktiivisesti lisää yhteistyökumppaneita ja uusia hankeideoita laajentaessamme toimintaamme Suomen markkinoilla.

Name: RenerCycle
Description: Making Circular Economy happen for Renewable Energy Industry

Name: Optimum Rope Access Solutions
Description:
Training, Services, and Gear for the Wind Energy Industry.

Optimum Academy provides GWO Basic Safety, Advanced Rescue, and Basic Technical Training through our first-class facility in Amarillo, TX.  Our mission is to make sure every technician is always prepared for any emergency because lives depend on it.

Optimum Rope Access provides a variety of services to the wind energy industry such as cleaning, bolting, and busbar repairs.  

Tower cleaning is our specialty!  Our technology is faster, safer, and more environmentally friendly than any other method in the industry.

Name: nabla wind hub
Description: Nabla Wind Hub is an independent wind engineering firm specialized in wind assets optimization. Our expertise covers Life Extension Analyses, Finite Element and Structural Analyses, Inspections and 3D Measurements, Technical Due Diligences, Aging Management Plans, and Advanced Engineering Services — ensuring maximum lifetime value and minimized technical risk across every stage of a wind asset’s life cycle.

Name: AEOLUS ENERGIA LTDA
Description: AEOLUS ENERGIA está baseada na excelência operacional em campo e priorizando, sempre, a Segurança e Saúde dos trabalhadores, bem como a conservação ambiental. Em um momento de elevado volume no mercado e com a necessidade da máxima expertise, a filosofia da AEOLUS ENERGIA é a otimização dos ativos do cliente, garantindo a geração de energia por meio de uma equipe altamente qualificada e com experiência acumulada em trabalhos desenvolvidos na Espanha, Alemanha, México, Índia, Japão, USA e Brasil , desde 2003, com distintas tecnologias . A companhia conta com o maior profissionalismo e está focada na melhora contínua, por meio de uma formação excepcional e total engajamento de todos os colaboradores.

Name: FARWIND ENERGY
Description:
FARWIND ENERGY is a spin-off of Centrale Nantes, one of the world leading university for marine renewable energy research. Farwind Energy is a pioneering company of far-offshore wind energy capture and delivery solutions, using energy ship technology, a disruptive technology for offshore wind energy conversion.
It was founded in July 2020 by Aurélien Babarit (co-inventor of the technology and former researcher at the Ecole Centrale de Nantes), Arnaud Poitou (former director of the Ecole Centrale de Nantes), and Félix Gorintin (former Director of Operations at the INNOSEA design office). 
FARWIND ENERGY is growing rapidly and now has a team of 15 people and aims at producing its first ship in 2024.
The company is supported by the innovation cluster Atlanpole, French public investment bank Bpifrance and the economic development subsidiary Airbus Développement as well as ESA BIC.

Name: Grupo Bons Ventos
Description: Do princípio ao fim promovendo sustentabilidade.

Name: Power Professionals Group
Description:
Power Professionals is an esteemed engineering and management consultancy that prides itself on providing specialised manpower solutions to the offshore wind industry. With a strong focus on delivering quality services, we aim to support and empower our clients in their pursuit of clean and sustainable energy.

At Power Professionals, we understand the unique challenges faced by the offshore wind sector and have built a team of highly skilled professionals who possess both technical expertise and a deep understanding of the industry. Our consultants are handpicked from various disciplines including engineering, project management, and renewable energy, ensuring that we can cater to a wide range of client requirements.

What sets us apart is not just our diverse skill set, but also our commitment to excellence and efficiency. We believe in forging strong partnerships with our clients, working closely with them to develop customised solutions that address their specific needs. Whether it's providing expert advice, project management support, or delivering specialised training programs, our team is dedicated to achieving exceptional results.

Our consultancy services extend beyond simply providing manpower. We offer comprehensive solutions throughout the project lifecycle, from conceptual design to installation. Additionally, we stay updated with the latest technological advancements and industry best practices, allowing us to deliver innovative and cost-effective solutions to our clients' offshore wind projects.

At Power Professionals, we value sustainability and environmental stewardship. We are proud to contribute to the growth of the offshore wind industry, promoting the development of clean energy sources that reduce the dependence on fossil fuels. Our team is driven by a common vision of creating a greener future, and we are passionate about supporting our clients in achieving their sustainability goals.

Name: WINDON
Description: Full scope Installation and Services, Consultancy, Training.

Name: Kitekraft
Description: Kitekraft systems consist of a tethered electric aircraft, a.k.a. a kite. The kite has 8 onboard (flying) wind turbines. It autonomously  flies in figure eights and generates electrical energy from the wind. Our systems need 10 times less construction materials compared to a conventional wind turbine, while being able to reach higher altitudes with stronger and more steady winds. This enables electricity generation at very low costs.

Name: Gael Energy
Description:
Gael Energy, founded in 2015 by Managing Director Hamish Campbell, began as a passion project to combine his love of engineering with the burgeoning wind energy sector. At the time, the small wind O&M market was under-supported, but Hamish saw an opportunity to provide top-quality engineering services to turbine owners. To achieve this goal, the company established relationships with major manufacturers in the sub 100kw market.

Now with over 400 wind turbines maintained throughout the nation, Gael Energy has experienced tremendous growth, operating from three nation-wide bases, continuously investing and developing our team of professionals and covering all sectors of the wind industry.

Name: Energy Challenges~Retos Energeticos
Description:
Energy Challenges is a group of companies geographically spread across North & South America and Europe, providing local service with global innovation to our customers.
The Group was established in 2013 with the founders’ vision to create an innovative service company that offers a personalized, tailored, and local service to customers. The founders are a team of professionals with decades of combined experience in the European and American renewable energy markets.
Since its creation in 2013, the Group has been dedicated to the innovation and Operation & Maintenance of solar and wind developments to serve our clients’ needs.
The vision of The Group is to be leaders in innovation, management, operation, maintenance, and training within the Renewable Energy field, actively contributing to the social and sustainable development of the communities in which we serve.

Name: Appia Wind Services
OrbisEnergy
Description:
OrbisEnergy is a landmark innovation and incubation centre for clean energy businesses in the East of England. A premier location for ambitious companies looking to set-up, harness and thrive in the UK’s clean growth region.

Providing not only first-class office accommodation, meeting rooms and world-class conference facilities, OrbisEnergy offers tenants, visitors and investors access to an unrivalled clean energy business network.

The 3,300sqm five-storey building, overlooking the North Sea at Great Britain’s most easterly location, Ness Point, Lowestotft, is home to companies that are driving innovation and investment in the UK's clean growth region.

With a wealth of clean energy developments including offshore wind, nuclear power, onshore renewables and alternative fuels, OrbisEnergy is the flagship location for businesses keen to capture the economic benefits from innovation and new technologies in the energy sector.

Name: KoalaLifter
Description: KoalaLifter is a disruptive self-climbing system that uses the strength of the wind turbine tower as support to climb up the turbine. KoalaLifter key invention is the way it embraces the tower with expandable collars. This makes KoalaLifter suitable for any wind turbine model of any height. It is able to perform major correctives or even the turbine erection without any need of high tonnage cranes.

Name: Eurowind Energy Romania
Description: Eurowind Energy este un important dezvoltator și operator danez de proiecte eoliene, solare și hibride, cu sediul central în Hobro, Danemarca. Cu peste 350 de angajați în 15 țări europene și SUA, obiectivul nostru este de a crea un viitor alimentat doar de energie regenerabilă. Suntem prezenți pe piața din România din 2011.

Name: Skyborn Renewables France
Description:
Skyborn Renewables s’engage pour un avenir sans carbone, en accélérant le déploiement de l’éolien en mer à l’échelle mondiale. Nous sommes convaincus que l’éolien en mer est le pilier de la transition énergétique, et qu’il permettra de sécuriser les approvisionnements énergétiques et diminuer les émissions carbones, pour offrir aux générations futures une énergie durable.
Pionnier et acteur majeur de l’éolien en mer, développeur et opérateur, Skyborn Renewables bénéficie de plus de 20 années d’expérience et 7 GW de parcs éoliens en mer développés dans le monde. Notre portefeuille de projets en cours de développement est supérieur à 30 GW.
Nous couvrons l’ensemble du cycle de vie des parcs éoliens en mer : développement, ingénierie et design, achat des composants, financement, construction et exploitation. Skyborn Renewables est présent dans 15 pays d’Europe et de la zone Asie-Pacifique, son siège est situé à Brème (Allemagne).
Pour plus d’informations : www.skybornrenewables.com

Name: Zhong Neng Project
Description: The Zhong Neng Offshore Wind Project is a 300MW project located off the western coast of Changhua. The Zhong Neng project is co-owned by China Steel Corporation, Taiwan’s state-owned and largest integrated steel maker, and a renewable energy infrastructure fund managed by Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners. The project has reached financial close in December 2021, and is expecting to start commercial operations in 2024.

Name: Hybrid Resource Management Ltd
Description: Hybrid RM are specialists in on and offshore wind energy resource provision. We supply skilled technicians, supervisors and deck personnel for servicing, O&M and major components work throughout the UK and Europe. We are proud to deliver safely managed, client-focused services to turbine manufacturers, wind farm owners and operators across some of Europe’s most diverse wind farm sites.

Name: Wind Estate
Description:
Wind Estate is one of Denmark's leading energy companies. We develop, buy, construct, own and operate sustainable wind and solar energy projects in Denmark and the United Kingdom. Wind Estate owns and operates more than 400 wind turbines. 
Our goal is to increase our share of the fossil free energy build out playing its part in the global transition towards a cleaner and sustainable future for current and coming generations. We have an ambitious but realistic growth strategy leading up to 2030 and 2035 through our project pipeline, new technologies and geographical expansion. 

We take pride in our company and our mission. We are dedicated, passionate, and humble towards our journey and grow our business in a responsible and financially sound manner, all whilst maintaining full our focus on being a progressive, safe  and enjoyable workplace.

Name: Skyborn Renewables Australia Pty Ltd
Description: Skyborn Renewables is driving global decarbonisation by accelerating offshore wind energy across the world. We believe offshore wind is a cornerstone of the clean energy transition and an enabler to achieve net-zero targets, ensure energy security, and a sustainable energy supply for future generations. Skyborn Renewables is a pioneer and leading offshore wind developer and operator with more than 20 years’ experience and a track record of approx. 7 GW developed around the globe to date. Our capabilities cover the entire offshore wind value chain, including greenfield development, engineering and design, procurement, financing, construction management and asset management. Skyborn's portfolio includes a global pipeline of > 30 GW in various stages of development. Headquartered in Bremen, Germany, the company is present in 15 European and APAC markets.

Name: OffshoreWind
Description: Updates. Facts. News. Knowledge

Name: Epsiline - WindEagle
Description:
EPSILINE is an innovative company offering ‘state-of-the-art’ IoT solutions to the global wind industry, keeping a fine balance between high-end technology and the economic reality of wind farms.

EPSILINE’s WindEagle is the most complete and reliable solution in the market to improve wind turbine performance. This unique All-in-One device includes multiple sensors (LiDAR, accelerometer, gyroscope, electronic compass, as well as pressure-temperature-humidity sensors). Using analysis and AI-based algorithms to provide alerts, to reduce downtime and automated reports for productivity improvement.

STATIC YAW MISALIGNMENT
60% of WT are misaligned, some with a yaw up to 15° in some cases leading to sharp reduction in performance. WINDEAGLE can accurately detect the static yaw misalignment, leading 1-3% AEP gains .

ROTOR IMBALANCE DETECTION
25% of WT suffer from rotor imbalance up to 2°. Rotor imbalance reduces the aerodynamic efficiency and can lead to reduced asset life of WT's. WINDEAGLE detects aerodynamic and mass imbalances. Correcting the rotor imbalances can lead up to 1% AEP gain. 

TURBULENCE INTENSITY BY WIND SECTOR
Turbulence intensity affects performance and has an impact on WT loads and fatigue. WINDEAGLE measures Turbulence Intensity directly in front of the blades where it is most precise. Curtailment strategies can be improved to increase performance and increase reliability of major components.
Wake steering control brings 3-5% AEP gain.

TRUE NORTH DETECTION
WINDEAGLE provides true north measurements to correct nacelle positions and improve curtailment strategies for a higher performance of the WT.

RELATIVE POWER CURVES
WINDEAGLE provides independent and accurate LiDAR based power curves, more precise than SCADA based power curves. Comparative analysis of power curves allows to evaluate improvements on WT or between WT.

Robust, precise and easily installed, WINDEAGLE is a pragmatic and highly competitive solution for WT optimisation and monitoring.

Name: Eurus Energy America Corporation
Description: As one of the pioneers behind early wind energy development, Eurus Energy America has been active in wind energy development in the United States since 1987.

Name: Bauwerk Consulting
Description:
BAUWERK CONSULTING mit Hauptsitz in Münster ist spezialisiert auf  Qualitätsmanagement, Baubegleitung und Begutachtung für Gründungs- und Tragstrukturen von Windenergieanlagen im In- und Ausland.

Wir sind ein Ingenieurbüro, das seit 2003 praxisorientierte und kostenoptimierte Lösungen in direkter Abstimmung mit seinen Kunden entwickelt. Baubegleitende Qualitätskontrollen für Neubau- und Sanierungsmaßnahmen sowie Begutachtungen an Fundamenten und Betontürmen für Windenergieanlagen sind unsere Kernkompetenz. Die zahlreichen Projekte haben uns zu erfahrenen Ansprechpartnern sowohl von Investoren und Betreibern als auch von Herstellern von Windenergieanlagen gemacht, und positionieren uns damit zum idealen Partner für jede Form von Realisierung und Erhalt, sowohl Onshore als auch Offshore.

Name: MBBF Windparkplanung GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Die MBBF-Unternehmensgruppe entwickelt, realisiert und betreibt seit 1994 Windenergieanlagen in Deutschland, Österreich und Polen. Ziel der MBBF-Gruppe war und ist es, die Planung und Projektierung von Windkraftanlagen im gesamten Bundesgebiet voranzutreiben und dabei Ökologie und Ökonomie miteinander zu verbinden.

Die MBBF-Unternehmensgruppe ist Ihr Garant für allumfassende und sorgfältige

- Planung
- Projektierung
- Errichtung und für den
- ordnungsgemäßen Betrieb

Die Qualität und Seriosität aller erbrachten Dienstleistungen im Laufe dieser langen Zeit werden nicht nur dadurch dokumentiert, dass wir zu den ältesten Unternehmensgruppen unserer Branche in Deutschland zählen, sondern auch dadurch, dass die meisten Grundstückseigentümer und Gemeinden, auf deren Flächen wir einen Windpark errichtet haben, auch erneut auf uns zukommen und die Zusammenarbeit mit uns suchen.

Name: GR Group
Description:
GR comprises a set of companies that operate in a complementary perspective allowing an optimization and rationalization of the resources required for their activities.
GR WIND marks the beginning of GR’s life course and is a national reference in the area of wind turbine element maintenance, with a solid track record in internationalization.
GR WIND optimizes wind turbine operation and contributes to clean-energy production efforts!
GR ACADEMY emerges to respond to the training and skills development needs felt by GR WIND to enable and prepare industrial maintenance technicians for the growing demands of the sector.
Training at GR ACADEMY enables the development and improvement of skills enhancing the technical, safety and environmental awareness qualities of the trainees.
GR ACADEMY guarantees the qualification of professionals with standards of excellence!
GR INDUSTRY was born from the opportunity, created by GR ACADEMY, to develop and adapt the innovative and disruptive work methods acquired by GR WIND to the industry.
It’s a solution that brings new skills and high standards of quality, rigor and safety to the industrial maintenance market.
GR INDUSTRY brings innovation and differentiation to industrial maintenance!
GR LAND embodies the GR group’s commitment to sustainable development, through its agricultural activity, in an organic production method. In this way, GR LAND actively contributes to reducing the ecological footprint of its corporate “ecosystem”.
GR LAND meets the needs of the current generation without compromising the needs of the future generation!

Name: GreenTechnologyRecycling
Description: Our company deals with the recycling of composite structures, mainly elements of offshore and onshore wind farms. We process nacelles and rotor blades of wind turbines into secondary raw materials, which are then used to produce new utility products. Our activities are aimed at minimizing the impact on the environment and building closed cycles with the use of secondary raw materials.

Name: Zuidenwind
Description:
Zuidenwind is een coöperatie van burgers die een duurzame samenleving dichterbij willen brengen. 
Het hoofddoel van de coöperatie is: meer windenergie realiseren. Dat doen we samen met de lokale bevolking. De coöperatie is opgericht in 2011, telt zo’n 800 leden en werkt voornamelijk in Zuid-Nederland. De rendementen van onze molens vloeien naar de lokale gemeenschap en de leden van de coöperatie.

De coöperatieve principes:
De basis van Zuidenwind zijn de zeven coöperatieve principes van ‘The International Cooperative Alliance’ (ICA): 

•	Open en vrijwillig lidmaatschap. Iedereen kan lid worden.
•	Democratische controle. De algemene ledenvergadering beslist.
•	De mogelijkheid van financiële participatie. Alleen leden kunnen desgewenst investeren in de coöperatie.
•	Autonomie en onafhankelijkheid. Zuidenwind is alleen van de leden.
•	Transparante informatieverstrekking. Zuidenwind geeft eerlijke en objectieve informatie.
•	Samenwerking. Zuidenwind werkt nauw samen met andere (energie)coöperaties.
•	Grote lokale betrokkenheid. Zuidenwind werkt samen met de lokale bevolking aan projecten. Ook de lusten blijven in de regio en dragen bij aan een grotere leefbaarheid.

Name: AWIS
Description:
Wind Energy

Awis is a service company specialising in the maintenance, construction, and repair of wind turbine systems. Name: WindEverest
Description:
Much of America's future is being tied to no or low-carbon sources of energy. In fact, the Inflation Reduction Act (2022) is projected to add 127 GW of wind generation capacity to the U.S. by 2030, roughly doubling the expected wind contributions to today's grids.  However, wind is intermittent, and two problems develop from overbuilding: 1) demand is unable to keep up with generation, and many turbines are forced to idle; 2) a way to capture the excess generation is to build stationary batteries, at a significant cost.  Either way, there are many extra resources present on the grid, which, themselves, require carbon to manufacture, install and maintain.

The WindEverest app guides electric car drivers to tap surplus electricity generated by wind turbines.  Currently there are a few nights each year that the grids in the N. American Great Plains experience electric surpluses.  A surplus, is any time that there is so much wind-driven energy on the grid, that the balancing authority (BA) for that grid needs to command wind turbines to stop. Since the wind turbine buildout is growing faster than electric vehicle introduction, these surpluses will only get worse. Unfortunately, for most drivers, the winds are either underreported in conventional weather forecasts, or, their apparent impact can be hundreds of miles away.

WindEverest app forecasts for the week ahead a hybrid infrastructure/wind report. Users tap the grid at the times winds are strong, and skip the nights when the winds are not producing.  Electric prices are driven down. The wind turbines collect more fees. And your neighbors breathe cleaner air. That is what we call, a win-win-win for wind. Visit WindEverest.com today, to see how you can join in.

Name: Svea Vind Offshore AB

Svea Vind Offshores ambition är att bidra till att göra Sverige hållbart – kanske det första fossilfria landet i världen. Ett grönt Sverige har potential att visa vägen till en klimatneutral värld samtidigt som vi utvecklar nya grenar av näringslivet.
På så sätt bidrar vi till en bättre miljö både lokalt och globalt och skapar jobb lokalt där vi verkar. Sverige kan därför bli ett show case i världen. Svea Vind Offshores bidrag är att vi fungerar som katalysator då vi möjliggör utbyggnad av vindkraft på lämpliga platser utifrån ekonomiska, tekniska och miljömässiga förutsättningar. Mer vindkraft ökar andelen förnybar el, vilket driver på omställningen till ett fossilfritt samhälle. Det sker bland annat genom elektrifiering av transporter och införandet av nya produktionslösningar i industrin.  

Bolaget grundades 2015 av Mattias Wärn och Maria Brolin. Båda drivs av en vilja att göra skillnad och bidra till en hållbar värld både vad gäller klimatet och jobbskapande lokalt där de verkar. Bolaget växer stadigt och i augusti 2020 öppnades huvudkontoret i Gävle och senare Uppsala. I januari 2023 öppnades kontor på Sveavägen i Stockholm. Anställda på bolaget arbetar även från Jönköping, Falkenberg och Göteborg.

Name: 8th Conference on Wind energy and Wildlife impacts - CWW2025
Description:
The biennial Conference on Wind Energy and Wildlife Impacts (CWW) is an internationally recognized event and one of the biggest conferences addressing the Wind energy / Wildlife topic. The mission of CWW is about bringing together the global community to share knowledge, tools and best practices on wind energy and wildlife interactions.

So far, there have been seven CWW events since the inaugural meeting in Norway in 2011, followed by Sweden in 2013, Germany in 2015, Portugal in 2017, Scotland in 2019, the Netherlands in 2022 and Croatia in 2023.

Every other year, CWW brings together researchers, consultants, wildlife technology companies, wind energy developers, regulators, financers and other interested parties to work together and share knowledge on science-based solutions to ecological concerns regarding wind power development.

The conference promotes a collaborative approach to resolving key ecological issues facing developers, investors, conservationists, decision makers and the public.

It brings together researchers, conservation scientists, wind industry professionals, and NGO representatives from around the world to share their know-how and experiences and develop solutions to avoid, minimize, and mitigate the impacts of wind farms on wildlife, both onshore and offshore. It also looks into the opportunities to enhance nature when developing wind farms.

I nostri uffici sono a Milano, Livorno e Noto (SR).

FERA vende l’energia elettrica che produce esclusivamente da fonti rinnovabili: eolico e il biogas.

Tra i primi sviluppatori di parchi eolici del mercato italiano per produttività degli impianti, FERA è cresciuta nel tempo costruendo impianti in diverse regioni italiane e investendo sulle tecnologie più innovative e sulla tutela di ambiente e territorio.
Enti, istituzioni pubbliche e cittadini sono gli stakeholders insieme ai quali FERA ha consolidato la reputazione di azienda virtuosa che opera con le best practices del settore, riconosciute a livello nazionale (premio PIMBY 2007, Klimaenergy Award 2008 e 2010, GEA Good Energy Award 2011) e internazionale (unica azienda italiana finalista al CSP Today Award 2012). 

Grazie agli impianti realizzati da FERA, i comuni hanno dato un importante contributo al raggiungimento degli obiettivi regionali per la riduzione delle emissioni di gas serra.

FERA è la Capogruppo del Gruppo FERA ed esercita attività operativa, di indirizzo strategico e di coordinamento attraverso le società controllate. 
Le società impegnate nel business eolico costituiscono una filiera integrata e fortemente sinergica. In particolare, Zefiro Energia SRL si occupa dello scouting del territorio e dell’iter per l’ottenimento dell’Autorizzazione Unica dei progetti, mentre Solo Rinnovabili SRL gestisce la costruzione e le successive fasi di gestione e manutenzione.

Name: Yunlin Offshore Wind Farm
Description:
The Yunlin Offshore Wind Farm (OWF) is strategically located in the Taiwan Strait, 8 to 17 km off Taiwan’s west coast, at water depths ranging from 7 to 35m. Spanning across 82km², the project features 80 wind turbine generators (WTGs), generating electricity and feeding it into the Taiwanese grid via two onshore substations in Taixi and Sihu, Yunlin County. Under two 20-year power purchase agreements with Taiwan Power Co. (TPC), the project ensures long-term renewable energy supply for Taiwan. Supported by a robust financial consortium of local and international banks as well as export credit agencies, the 640 MW Yunlin OWF is one of Taiwan’s largest offshore wind farms,which generates clean renewable energy for over 600,000 Taiwanese households, whilst saving 1,200,000t of CO₂ emissions annually, delivering lasting value to the clean energy transition and the society.

Shareholders of the Yunlin Offshore Wind Farm, owned by Yunneng Wind Power Co., Ltd., are Skyborn Renewables, Total Energies, EGCO Group and Sojitz Corporation.

Name: Taranaki Offshore Partnership
Description:
Our vision is that offshore wind provides transformational and scalable clean energy for future generations of New Zealanders.

For that, we are investigating the feasibility of a large offshore wind farm off the coast of South Taranaki. We envisage the wind farm being located roughly 25km offshore – just visible over the horizon on a clear day. With up to 70 of the most powerful wind turbines available on the market (almost as tall as the Sky Tower in Auckland!) the farm could power 650,000 homes and satisfy around 10% of Aotearoa’s electricity demand.

We are working hard on studying and understanding the community and environment of South Taranaki to start developing mitigation plans and minimising impacts.

- Global Expansion: Nuriel Energy is expanding internationally, offering seamless charging solutions across multiple countries.
- Investment Opportunities: Through our *EV Chargers Investment Program*, individuals and businesses can co-own or host EV chargers, earning profits from our high-performing stations.

Our vision is to create a world where sustainable transportation is accessible to everyone by establishing a charging infrastructure that’s as ubiquitous and reliable as traditional refueling stations.

Join us in building a cleaner, greener future.

Description:

Our timing to market, our team, and our strategic focus will drive our success.

We collaborate with our clients by providing them with the necessary tools, knowledge, and resources to make the transition to clean energy as seamless as possible using embedded wind power. We build a complete solution tailored for each client – including the use of complementary renewables-based technologies such as solar energy, battery energy storage systems (BESS) and strategic grid access arrangements where appropriate - sometimes supported by temporary transition peaking capacity from gas or diesel. We also source debt and equity capital providers and investment partners to optimise the capital base for each project. Our current focus is on building out a portfolio of wind farms with commercial and industrial clients with a base load power consumption of at least 5MW – initially in Western Australia – and then in India and Ireland.

Name: Kitenergy S.r.l.
Description:
Our innovation converts High Altitude Wind Energy (HAWE) into electricity, by exploiting the flight of automatically controlled tethered kites. The power kites operate between 200-800 m above the ground, where wind power is 4x higher, more constant and with better global coverage than surface wind patterns used by current wind turbine technology. Electricity is generated at ground level by converting the traction forces acting on the tethers into mechanical and electrical power, using electrical generators.
The combined effect of higher wind power density at altitude, increased energy efficiency (aka capacity factor) and smaller capital costs of a lean infrastructure equate to a very competitive economic performance.
A first small scale prototype was built and operated successfully in 2010. A second larger prototype of 60 kW nominal power was realized at the end of 2012 and extensively tested between 2013 and 2017 delivering significant adherence of actual performance to theoretical figures.
At the time of writing, a second pre-industrial prototype of this model is being tested to achieve the industrialization scale.
Our team is recognized at international level as pioneer in this field and has been granted several top-level innovation awards from ENI, IEEE and is a founder and member of the Airborne Wind Energy Consortium.
In 2017 Kitenergy has been awarded as Global Innovator during the Expo Live "Innovation Impact Programme" (Dubai Expo2020) and has received a Certificate of Appreciation “Our common future: Energy, Environment & Development” Expo 2017 Astana (Kazakhstan).

Name: Optimum Academy
Description:
Optimum Academy is a certified full-service wind energy and rope access training facility located in Amarillo, Texas. We specialize in world-class GWO and SPRAT training for the wind industry. 

We’ve been offering GWO training since 2015 and offer the full suite of Basic Safety, Basic Technical, Advanced Rescue, and Control of Hazardous Energy training classes weekly. We also offer SPRAT Training for techs wanting to begin or further their careers in rope access.

Our training facility is conveniently located in the heart of the most saturated wind energy region in the country, and we’re a direct flight away from multiple cities.  
With nearly 100 years of combined expertise on our team, we’ve successfully trained over 4,000 technicians and worked on 100+ wind farms across the country. 

What makes our training different? We’ve been doing GWO training longer than most, our facility is first-class, and our trainers are passionate about what they do. 

Wind Tech U, the newest division of Optimum Academy, is a first-of-its-kind program designed to provide a quality pipeline of technicians to wind energy service providers. We recruit, train, and place techs with companies like yours for half the cost of what it would take for you to train them yourself.

Our Clients Enjoy:

•	Easy online registration
•	Excellent customer service
•	Fastest GWO course timelines 
•	Highest caliber GWO training
•	Competitive prices and incredible value
•	Technician recruiting, training, and placement

You will not get more value for the price anywhere else – plus we offer group rates and bulk discounts. We’re trusted by leading names such as GE, Vestas, SGRE, RNWBL, Rangel, SkyMast, and many others.

Our mission is to ensure every technician is always prepared… because lives depend on it.  Keep your staff safe and give your techs the training they deserve.

Contact me at todd@optimumras.com for more information.

Name: Deutsche Offshore Schifffahrt
Description:
Deutsche Offshore Schifffahrt is offering a new type of support vessel to the offshore energy market: construction commissioning service operation vessels (C-CSOVs). 

The joint venture with Schoeller Holdings has ordered four vessels from CSSC Huangpu Wenchong Shipbuilding Co., Ltd. which are due to hit the market beginning Q1 2027 and secured additional optional vessels.

Established in 2023, Deutsche Offshore Schifffahrt has innovated the prevailing CSOV designs in order to develop a multi purpose vessel aimed at serving the entire range of Offshore Energy Markets. While in its primary nature the vessels offer benchmark capabilities for commissioning and servicing Offshore Wind Parks, it will further be applicable to a wide range of light construction and installation works as well as IMR and cable repair tasks.

As such, the vessel is aimed at fostering the green energy transition by offering year around CSOV capacity and relieving high value Offshore Wind installation tonnage by working in symbiosis with them. At the same time, it offers the Subsea market a new approach to cover diverse tasks in a cost effective fashion.

Technical management as well as crewing will be provided by Columbia Shipmanagement, which, like the multipurpose cargo shipping company AAL, is part of Schoeller Holdings. Columbia Shipmanagement comprises vast experience in technically operating highly complex vessels with the ability to efficiently run hotel operations on board of a vessel.

Name: 2-B Energy
Description:
2-B Energy will introduce and commercialize at a global level, an offshore wind power plant concept with significant lower Cost of Energy produced. 
The first demonstration turbine was installed in Eemshaven (NL) in Q4 2015.

At 2-B Energy, we aim to have the members of our team inspired and integrated in the overall design process. Here thinking out of the box in combination with realistic view and completion are fundamental drivers among the colleagues. Therefore the 2-B team is a unique group where tradition is challenged and realization is a virtue. By introducing power plant components in design work, process ownership and plant awareness brings strength to both technology and the company.

The higher level design philosophy by 2-B Energy team has been to balance basic design choices with specific high level design principles of improvement. The main goal: to realize aggressive life cycle Cost of Energy reduction and risk through integrated design approach between the power plant components where the wind turbine is a central part.

Name: Viure de l'Aire de Barcelona
Description:
Viure de l'Aire de Barcelona és un projecte d'energia eòlica de participació ciutadana basat en els principis de sostenibilitat, proximitat i democratització de l'energia. El nostre projecte és Renovable, Comunitari, Local i Educatiu.

Viure de l’aire de Barcelona pretén ser molt més que un projecte de generació d’electricitat a partir de fonts renovables. Vol ser una eina a mans de la ciutadania de l’àrea metropolitana que afavoreixi el procés de transició energètica cap a un model energètic més descentralitzat i participatiu. Volem generar energia elèctrica de forma distribuïda, a prop dels centres de consum i amb un recurs autòcton.

El projecte el formen 2 aerogeneradors de 6 MW de potència cadascú que produiran 29 GWh a l'any. Això vol dir que més de 8.800 llars de Barcelona podran ser abastides amb aquesta energia elèctrica 100% renovable, evitant així l'emissió anual de 7.000 tones de CO2 a la nostra atmosfera.

És una projecte de propietat col·lectiva i finançat pels socis i sòcies: ciutadania, empreses i comerços.

Name: Eole Stab
Description:
Dans un contexte de transition énergétique où les énergies marines renouvelables offrent de grandes perspectives de développement, la rencontre de ces savoir-faire durant 6 années de R&D a permis l’éclosion d’une technologie de rupture dans le domaine de l’éolien flottant de grande puissance : la plateforme EOLE STAB.

EOLE STAB repose sur le principe d’une plateforme pour éoliennes offshore (>15MW) insensible aux effets de la houle et du vent, afin de réduire les accélérations auxquelles sont soumises les éoliennes. 

Ces dispositions permettent d’augmenter leur productivité et réduire leurs frais de maintenance, tout en augmentant la durée de vie de l’exploitation et sa rentabilité. 

EOLE STAB revendique à travers 5 brevets internationaux un design TLP béton cylindrique en rupture technologique comprenant :
- Un caisson béton totalement immergé
- Un mât ajouré qui présente une traînée minimale à la houle
- Un système add-on de récupération d’énergie
- Un ancrage par un système original multi-tridimensionnel
- Une fabrication entièrement réalisable à quai (à raison d’une éolienne par semaine)

A travers une conception optimisée qui réduit considérablement les mouvements et accélérations, la plateforme EOLE STAB présente de nombreux atouts pour le secteur éolien offshore :
- Augmentation de la durée de vie
- Sécurité accrue de l’exploitation
- Diminution des coûts de maintenance
- Réduction des ressources nécessaires
- Réduction des impacts environnementaux
- Retour sur investissement et bénéfices améliorés

Name: EuroWindWakes Project
Description:
The North Sea Energy Cooperation agreed in September 2022 to have at least 260 GW of offshore wind energy installed by 2050. However, this impressive plan risks facing a massive reduction of capacity factor due to atmospheric effects such as wakes and global blockage. The resulting loss of power production potential is a severe risk for the energy transition due to power production costs and lack of confidence of investors. The main objective of the tri-national EuroWindWakes (EWW) project is to develop, enhance, validate and benchmark various multi-scale wake modelling techniques from applied science and current industry standards. The objective is to reduce the prediction uncertainty from 20-30% to less than 10%, which enables optimized maritime spatial planning, de-risks asset development and allows reliable forecasting of power production – all required to unleash the huge offshore wind power potential. The project is coordinated by Fraunhofer IWES with partners from research and consulting from Germany (ForWind, DWD), Denmark (DTU, EMD, DHI), the Netherlands (Pondera, TU Delft) and supported by a number of associated globally active wind farm operators and advise from planning authorities. 
Project Relevance
Cluster wakes are cumulative atmospheric wind farm effects threatening the energy transition by high prediction uncertainty and high efficiency losses of offshore assets. EuroWindWakes reduces the uncertainty in the assessment of long-range effects, enabling optimal asset siting in maritime spatial planning and wind farm development. Thereby it improves the effective use of resources, LCoE and planning security for investors and authorities as well as giving respective regional climate impacts.
Imprint: https://www.iwes.fraunhofer.de/en/publishing-notes.html   
Privacy Policy: https://www.iwes.fraunhofer.de/en/data_protection.html

Name: NEXTgenT
Description:
NEXT generation of over 25MW offshore wind Turbine rotor design (NEXTgenT) is doctoral network focus to develop the next generation of 25+MW offshore wind turbine rotor systems through research in atmospheric science and wind turbine technologies.

Offshore wind turbines are expected to surpass 25 MW and 350-meter rotor diameters in the next 5-10 years. This increase is driven by the reduction of costs and the need to generate more wind power to meet the energy transition goals to renewable resources. 
This new scenario requires further research to develop simulations tools, control concepts and sustainability practices as the design and analysis of such large-scale turbines.

NEXTgenT addresses these challenges by educating a new generation of highly skilled researchers through a unique multidisciplinary, intersectoral, and international programme to support the wind turbine system OEMs (Original Equipment Manufacturers), O&M (Operation and Maintenance) companies, sustainable material companies, and wind farm development and operating industry. 

This project is funded by the European Union under HorizonEU research and innovation programme.

Views and opinions expressed are those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or European Research Executive Agency (REA). Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

Energy prices continue to surge whilst blackouts and supply interruptions threaten your operations. Your business shouldn't be at the mercy of volatile energy markets and unreliable grid infrastructure.

Grid operators impose hefty penalties for energy underuse or overuse, creating financial uncertainty. Managing contractual energy commitments has become a complex balancing act that drains resources and attention from your core business.

Your business vision shouldn't be held hostage by grid operators and energy constraints. You deserve the freedom to grow, operate, and innovate without being restricted by energy scarcity or punitive pricing structures.

A Solution to Your Energy Independence

The turbines generate energy for the business, saving energy costs, eliminating grid penalties, while maintaining operational continuity. 

The installation not only saves money, but it also actively creates positive revenue from energy trending:

Name: Aeroleaf Europe
Description:

Het concept bestaat uit een dubbelbladige structuur met een verticale as in de vorm van een blad en een synchrone microgenerator uitgerust met permanente magneten. Hierdoor werkt het systeem geruisloos en vormt het geen gevaar voor vogels. Dag en nacht, 24/7, geruisloos, zonder slagschaduw en op een vogelvriendelijke wijze.
Ideale locaties voor de installaties van Aeroleafs zijn daken, terrassen, tuinen, weides, bermen, masten, lantaarnpalen en andere ondersteunende constructies die in staat zijn om de krachten en trillingen op te vangen die door het roterende blad worden overgebracht.
Samen met zonne-energie en een intelligente batterij is dit een volgende stap naar een klimaatneutrale toekomst. De Aeroleaf wordt in België geproduceerd en is grotendeels vervaardigd uit gerecycleerd PMD-materiaal waardoor de CO2-voetafdruk te verwaarlozen is.
