Name: AIWinTurCoM - Artificial Intelligence for Wind Turbine Condition Monitoring (UPC-IKERLAN)
Description:
The world energy system is undoubtedly in transition. The widespread adoption of renewable energy are the key to fight climate change. The European Commission's scenarios show renewables-based electrification will be central to delivering climate neutrality in Europe by 2050. To accomplish this target, wind energy is a crucial component as it is required to be 50% of the European Union’s electricity mix with renewables representing 81%. However, the crux of the matter in the advancement of the wind industry is the reduction in its levelized cost of energy (LCOE). The LCOE of a wind park is determined by combining different factors, but operation and maintenance costs constitute a significant part. Therefore, a key factor to accomplish low-cost wind energy is through the optimization of the maintenance strategies. 

Energy production losses due to downtime together with the costs associated to the replacement of components can scale up to millions of euros per year in any industrial-size wind park. Thus, it is of paramount importance that the wind industry moves from corrective and preventive maintenance to the so-called predictive maintenance. Predictive maintenance is based on actual and timely information collected monitoring the actual asset through a network of sensors and provides operators with an advanced warning before the actual fatal fault occurs, thus allowing them to plan ahead and schedule repair to coincide with weather or production windows to reduce costs and turbine downtime. Digitalization and artificial intelligence are key technologies to this strategy, to better exploit the information in the large amount of data from different sensors acquired from the assets. 

Within this framework, the overall objective of AIWinTurCoM is to contribute to the development of advanced predictive maintenance strategies based on artificial intelligence, such as machine learning and deep learning approaches, for the early prediction of failure/damage.

durch Information, Vernetzung, Presse- und Öffentlichkeitsarbeit sowie die Unterstützung von R&D, die Verbreitung neuer professioneller Anwendungen und  Prozesse, Standards und Normen in diesen Bereichen fördern.

Name: Delft Cymatics
Description: Delft Cymatics is your consultant in assessing offshore sound and vibrations. We provide consultation and support in the field of offshore sound predictions and noise mitigation. We specialise in noise predictions related to the installation of monopile foundations for the offshore wind industry by leveraging our state-of-the-art software.

Name: Aiolos NTUA
Description:
Aiolos is a research student team of the National Technical University of Athens (NTUA). The team is composed of undergraduate students from the School of Mechanical Engineering and the School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, working collaboratively to design and develop innovative wind energy solutions. 

   Our main focus is the design and construction of a small-scale wind turbine, competing in the International Small Wind Turbine Contest (ISWTC), a global competition promoting sustainable energy solutions. This year, our team is preparing for ISWTC 2025 in Nantes, France, marking our second participation in the contest after our debut at ISWTC 2024, in Delft, Netherlands.

   Through rigorous research, hands-on prototyping and the challenge of demanding deadlines, our members expand their technical expertise in aerodynamics, electrical systems and renewable energy technologies. We aim to push the boundaries of small wind turbine efficiency, contributing to the development of sustainable energy solutions for the future.

Name: Light House Electrical
Description: Established in 1974, we have been serving our prestigious clients for over five decades. We specialize in Motor & generator rewinding works. We are also the Authorized Service Center for Stanley, Black & Decker & DeWalt for Abu Dhabi region.

Name: JT Energy Solutions A/S
Description:
Based on a large experience from the renewable industry, JT Energy Solutions is established to make an impact for your business. 

Our mission is to: Remove obstacles and lower electricity production costs in a sustainable way.

We operate within these business areas:

a) We optimize your supply chain within the Wind industry and ensure implementation of cost outs. 
b) We help you with technical trouble shooting and find effective solutions for wind turbine optimization.
c) We help you with your Multibrand operations.
d) We refurbish various components and create effective repair return loops, to support sustainability. 
e) We provide state of the art lubrication solutions for larger bearings such as main, pitch, gear, and generator bearings by supplying lubrications based on an unique nanotechnology. Lutra is an additive that reduces friction and improves the anti-wear characteristics.  

Our purpose is to support your business based on high technical standards, agility, transparency, and the willingness to walk the extra mile to succeed.

Name: OMEGA Tools GmbH
Description:
International agierender Partner und Dienstleister für Hersteller und Betreiber von Windkraftanlagen
- Das Portfolio des 2017 in Ritterhude bei Bremen gegründeten Unternehmen umfasst neben klassischen Service- und Wartungsdienstleistungen sowie wiederkehrenden Sicherheitsprüfungen und Befahranlagenprüfungen auch besonders herausfordernde Servicearbeiten an On- und Offshore-Windkraftanlagen aller Art. Flexibel, Leistungsstark, zuverlässig und ISO-zertifiziert für 9001, 14001 und 45001 arbeitet Omega-Tools erfolgreich im gesamten europäischen Raum.

Als dynamische Think-Tank-Firma entwickeln wir Produkte und Anwendungen, mit denen sich die Leistungsfähigkeit und Ertragsausbeute einer jeden Windkraftanlage optimieren lässt.

Unser Ziel ist es, die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden frühzeitig zu erkennen und deren Anforderungen optimal in hocheffizienten Lösungen umzusetzen. Grundlagen hierfür sind das umfassende Know-How unserer hoch motivierten Mitarbeiter sowie ein einzigartiges Prozessverständnis, das in den letzten Jahren von erfahrenen Monteuren und Ingenieuren kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt wurde.
